--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
```python
from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, datetime, re

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)

openapi = &quot;&quot;&quot;openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Delivery Verification &amp; Escrow API
  version: 0.3.0
  description: |
    API для загрузки артефактов в quarantine, верификации (scan/policy/review), выпуска (release/CAS),
    выдачи presigned URL, управления review/DLQ/политиками и DSAR/retention.
servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com
security:
  - bearerAuth: []
tags:
  - name: Delivery
  - name: Artifact
  - name: Review
  - name: Admin
  - name: DSAR
  - name: DLQ
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
  parameters:
    RequestId:
      name: X-Request-Id
      in: header
      required: false
      schema: { type: string }
      description: Идентификатор запроса для трассировки.
  responses:
    ErrorResponse:
      description: Ошибка
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [error, message]
      properties:
        error: { type: string, description: Машинный код ошибки }
        message: { type: string }
        details: { type: object, additionalProperties: true }
        trace_id: { type: string }

    Delivery:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, status, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [submitted, verification_pending_review, verified_pass, verified_fail, accepted, rejected, deleted]
        title: { type: string }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        deleted_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

    Artifact:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, status, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        filename: { type: string }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        declared_mime: { type: string }
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [uploaded_quarantine, scan_in_progress, scanned_fail, released_pending_review, released, deleted]
        sha256_quarantine: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        sha256_released: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        blob_sha256: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        quarantine_key: { type: string, nullable: true }
        released_key: { type: string, nullable: true }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        deleted_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

    VerificationReport:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, verdict, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        artifact_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        verdict: { type: string, enum: [pass, fail, pending_review] }
        failure_code: { type: string, nullable: true }
        risk_score: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
        signals:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

    PresignedDownloadResponse:
      type: object
      required: [url, expires_in_sec, sha256, size_bytes]
      properties:
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        sha256: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot; }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        filename: { type: string }

    CreateDeliveryRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        title: { type: string }
        data_class: { type: string, enum: [D0, D1, D2, D3], default: D1 }
        level: { type: string, enum: [L0, L1, L2], default: L0 }

    CreateDeliveryResponse:
      type: object
      required: [delivery]
      properties:
        delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }

    CreateArtifactUploadRequest:
      type: object
      required: [filename, size_bytes, declared_mime]
      properties:
        filename: { type: string }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        declared_mime: { type: string }

    CreateArtifactUploadResponse:
      type: object
      required: [artifact, upload_url, expires_in_sec, required_headers]
      properties:
        artifact: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Artifact&#x27; }
        upload_url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer }
        required_headers:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: { type: string }
          description: Заголовки, которые клиент обязан добавить при PUT (например Content-Type).

    ReviewCase:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, status, reason_code, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        artifact_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        status: { type: string, enum: [pending, in_progress, approved, rejected, redacted] }
        reason_code: { type: string }
        risk_score: { type: integer }
        assigned_to: { type: string, format: uuid, nullable: true }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

    ReviewResolveRequest:
      type: object
      required: [resolution]
      properties:
        resolution: { type: string, enum: [approve, reject, request_redaction] }
        note: { type: string }

    TenantQuota:
      type: object
      required: [tenant_id, scans_per_min, bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans]
      properties:
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        scans_per_min: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        bytes_per_day: { type: integer, format: int64, minimum: 1 }
        max_inflight_scans: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }

    DSARExportResponse:
      type: object
      required: [subject_id, export_url, expires_in_sec]
      properties:
        subject_id: { type: string }
        export_url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer }

    DLQItem:
      type: object
      required: [id, topic, attempts, error, moved_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid, nullable: true }
        topic: { type: string }
        payload: { type: object, additionalProperties: true }
        attempts: { type: integer }
        error: { type: string }
        moved_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

paths:
  /v1/deliveries:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Создать delivery
      parameters: [{ $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateDeliveryRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;201&quot;:
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateDeliveryResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;401&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Получить delivery
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;404&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/artifacts:
    post:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Создать artifact + получить presigned upload URL (quarantine)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateArtifactUploadRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;201&quot;:
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateArtifactUploadResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;429&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

    get:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Список artifacts в delivery
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  artifacts:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Artifact&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/submit:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Завершить загрузку и запустить верификацию (scan/policy)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/accept:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Принять delivery (escrow release)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/reject:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Отклонить delivery (escrow refund)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download:
    get:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Получить presigned URL на скачивание released артефакта + sha256 для клиентской проверки
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { name: artifact_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/PresignedDownloadResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;403&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;404&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases:
    get:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Список review cases (tenant-scoped)
      parameters:
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  cases:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases/{case_id}/claim:
    post:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Взять case в работу (SKIP LOCKED серверной логикой)
      parameters:
        - { name: case_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  case: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases/{case_id}/resolve:
    post:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Завершить review case (approve/reject/request_redaction)
      parameters:
        - { name: case_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewResolveRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  case: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/quotas:
    put:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Обновить квоты tenant
      parameters:
        - { name: tenant_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/TenantQuota&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  quota: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/TenantQuota&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/dlq:
    get:
      tags: [DLQ]
      summary: Список DLQ сообщений (admin)
      parameters:

      responses:

              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  items:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/DLQItem&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/dlq/{id}/replay:
    post:
      tags: [DLQ]
      summary: Replay DLQ сообщения обратно в outbox (контролируемо)
      parameters:
        - { name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:

  /v1/dsar/subjects/{subject_id}/export:
    post:
      tags: [DSAR]
      summary: DSAR export (дать ссылку на выгрузку)
      parameters:

      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/DSARExportResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/dsar/subjects/{subject_id}/erase:
    post:
      tags: [DSAR]
      summary: DSAR erase (удаление/псевдонимизация/crypto-shred по правилам)
      parameters:
        - { name: subject_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  queued: { type: boolean }
```

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
from pathlib import Path
import json

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)

openapi = &quot;&quot;&quot;openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Delivery Verification &amp; Escrow API
  version: 0.3.0
  description: |
    API для загрузки артефактов в quarantine, верификации (scan/policy/review), выпуска (release/CAS),
    выдачи presigned URL, управления review/DLQ/политиками и DSAR/retention.
servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com
security:
  - bearerAuth: []
tags:
  - name: Delivery
  - name: Artifact
  - name: Review
  - name: Admin
  - name: DSAR
  - name: DLQ
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
  parameters:
    RequestId:
      name: X-Request-Id
      in: header
      required: false
      schema: { type: string }
      description: Идентификатор запроса для трассировки.
  responses:
    ErrorResponse:
      description: Ошибка
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [error, message]
      properties:
        error: { type: string, description: Машинный код ошибки }
        message: { type: string }
        details: { type: object, additionalProperties: true }
        trace_id: { type: string }

    Delivery:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, status, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [submitted, verification_pending_review, verified_pass, verified_fail, accepted, rejected, deleted]
        title: { type: string }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        deleted_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

    Artifact:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, status, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        filename: { type: string }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        declared_mime: { type: string }
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [uploaded_quarantine, scan_in_progress, scanned_fail, released_pending_review, released, deleted]
        sha256_quarantine: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        sha256_released: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        blob_sha256: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot;, nullable: true }
        quarantine_key: { type: string, nullable: true }
        released_key: { type: string, nullable: true }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        deleted_at: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }

    VerificationReport:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, verdict, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        artifact_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        verdict: { type: string, enum: [pass, fail, pending_review] }
        failure_code: { type: string, nullable: true }
        risk_score: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
        signals:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

    PresignedDownloadResponse:
      type: object
      required: [url, expires_in_sec, sha256, size_bytes]
      properties:
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        sha256: { type: string, pattern: &quot;^[0-9a-f]{64}$&quot; }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        filename: { type: string }

    CreateDeliveryRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        title: { type: string }
        data_class: { type: string, enum: [D0, D1, D2, D3], default: D1 }
        level: { type: string, enum: [L0, L1, L2], default: L0 }

    CreateDeliveryResponse:
      type: object
      required: [delivery]
      properties:
        delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }

    CreateArtifactUploadRequest:
      type: object
      required: [filename, size_bytes, declared_mime]
      properties:
        filename: { type: string }
        size_bytes: { type: integer, format: int64 }
        declared_mime: { type: string }

    CreateArtifactUploadResponse:
      type: object
      required: [artifact, upload_url, expires_in_sec, required_headers]
      properties:
        artifact: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Artifact&#x27; }
        upload_url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer }
        required_headers:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: { type: string }
          description: Заголовки, которые клиент обязан добавить при PUT (например Content-Type).

    ReviewCase:
      type: object
      required: [id, tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, status, reason_code, created_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        delivery_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        artifact_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        status: { type: string, enum: [pending, in_progress, approved, rejected, redacted] }
        reason_code: { type: string }
        risk_score: { type: integer }
        assigned_to: { type: string, format: uuid, nullable: true }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

    ReviewResolveRequest:
      type: object
      required: [resolution]
      properties:
        resolution: { type: string, enum: [approve, reject, request_redaction] }
        note: { type: string }

    TenantQuota:
      type: object
      required: [tenant_id, scans_per_min, bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans]
      properties:
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        scans_per_min: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        bytes_per_day: { type: integer, format: int64, minimum: 1 }
        max_inflight_scans: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }

    DSARExportResponse:
      type: object
      required: [subject_id, export_url, expires_in_sec]
      properties:
        subject_id: { type: string }
        export_url: { type: string, format: uri }
        expires_in_sec: { type: integer }

    DLQItem:
      type: object
      required: [id, topic, attempts, error, moved_at]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        tenant_id: { type: string, format: uuid, nullable: true }
        topic: { type: string }
        payload: { type: object, additionalProperties: true }
        attempts: { type: integer }
        error: { type: string }
        moved_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

paths:
  /v1/deliveries:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Создать delivery
      parameters: [{ $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateDeliveryRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;201&quot;:
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateDeliveryResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;401&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Получить delivery
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;404&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/artifacts:
    post:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Создать artifact + presigned upload URL (quarantine)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateArtifactUploadRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;201&quot;:
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/CreateArtifactUploadResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;429&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

    get:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Список artifacts в delivery
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  artifacts:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Artifact&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/submit:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Завершить загрузку и запустить верификацию (scan/policy)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/accept:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Принять delivery (escrow release)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/reject:
    post:
      tags: [Delivery]
      summary: Отклонить delivery (escrow refund)
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  delivery: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/Delivery&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/deliveries/{delivery_id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download:
    get:
      tags: [Artifact]
      summary: Presigned download URL на released артефакт + sha256
      parameters:
        - { name: delivery_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { name: artifact_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/PresignedDownloadResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;403&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }
        &quot;404&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases:
    get:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Список review cases (tenant-scoped)
      parameters:
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  cases:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases/{case_id}/claim:
    post:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Взять case в работу
      parameters:
        - { name: case_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  case: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/review/cases/{case_id}/resolve:
    post:
      tags: [Review]
      summary: Завершить review case (approve/reject/request_redaction)
      parameters:
        - { name: case_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewResolveRequest&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  case: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/ReviewCase&#x27; }
        &quot;409&quot;: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/responses/ErrorResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/quotas:
    put:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Обновить квоты tenant
      parameters:
        - { name: tenant_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/TenantQuota&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  quota: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/TenantQuota&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/dlq:
    get:
      tags: [DLQ]
      summary: Список DLQ сообщений (admin)
      parameters:
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;200&quot;:
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  items:
                    type: array
                    items: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/DLQItem&#x27; }

  /v1/admin/dlq/{id}/replay:
    post:
      tags: [DLQ]
      summary: Replay DLQ сообщения обратно в outbox
      parameters:
        - { name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string, format: uuid } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  replayed: { type: boolean }

  /v1/dsar/subjects/{subject_id}/export:
    post:
      tags: [DSAR]
      summary: DSAR export (дать ссылку на выгрузку)
      parameters:
        - { name: subject_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: &#x27;#/components/schemas/DSARExportResponse&#x27; }

  /v1/dsar/subjects/{subject_id}/erase:
    post:
      tags: [DSAR]
      summary: DSAR erase (удаление/псевдонимизация/crypto-shred по правилам)
      parameters:
        - { name: subject_id, in: path, required: true, schema: { type: string } }
        - { $ref: &#x27;#/components/parameters/RequestId&#x27; }
      responses:
        &quot;202&quot;:
          description: Accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  queued: { type: boolean }

openapi_path = base / &quot;openapi.v0_3.yaml&quot;
openapi_path.write_text(openapi, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

    &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Delivery Verification &amp; Escrow API (v0.3)&quot;,

  },
  &quot;item&quot;: [

        {
          &quot;name&quot;: &quot;Replay DLQ item&quot;,
          &quot;request&quot;: {
            &quot;method&quot;: &quot;POST&quot;,
            &quot;url&quot;: {&quot;raw&quot;: &quot;{{baseUrl}}/v1/admin/dlq/{{dlq_id}}/replay&quot;, &quot;host&quot;: [&quot;{{baseUrl}}&quot;], &quot;path&quot;: [&quot;v1&quot;, &quot;admin&quot;, &quot;dlq&quot;, &quot;{{dlq_id}}&quot;, &quot;replay&quot;]}
          }
        },
        {
          &quot;name&quot;: &quot;DSAR export&quot;,
          &quot;request&quot;: {
            &quot;method&quot;: &quot;POST&quot;,
            &quot;url&quot;: {&quot;raw&quot;: &quot;{{baseUrl}}/v1/dsar/subjects/{{subject_id}}/export&quot;, &quot;host&quot;: [&quot;{{baseUrl}}&quot;], &quot;path&quot;: [&quot;v1&quot;, &quot;dsar&quot;, &quot;subjects&quot;, &quot;{{subject_id}}&quot;, &quot;export&quot;]}
          }
        },
        {
          &quot;name&quot;: &quot;DSAR erase&quot;,
          &quot;request&quot;: {
            &quot;method&quot;: &quot;POST&quot;,
            &quot;url&quot;: {&quot;raw&quot;: &quot;{{baseUrl}}/v1/dsar/subjects/{{subject_id}}/erase&quot;, &quot;host&quot;: [&quot;{{baseUrl}}&quot;], &quot;path&quot;: [&quot;v1&quot;, &quot;dsar&quot;, &quot;subjects&quot;, &quot;{{subject_id}}&quot;, &quot;erase&quot;]}
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  &quot;variable&quot;: [
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;baseUrl&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;https://api.example.com&quot;},
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;delivery_id&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;&quot;},
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;artifact_id&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;&quot;},
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;case_id&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;&quot;},
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;dlq_id&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;&quot;},
    {&quot;key&quot;: &quot;subject_id&quot;, &quot;value&quot;: &quot;&quot;}
  ]
}
postman_path = base / &quot;postman_collection.v0_3.json&quot;
postman_path.write_text(json.dumps(postman, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

(str(openapi_path), str(postman_path))

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Продолжение сделал в виде **двух готовых артефактов**, чтобы можно было сразу подключать к Swagger UI / генераторам SDK и к entity[&quot;company&quot;,&quot;Postman&quot;,&quot;api client&quot;] для ручного тестирования:

- [Download OpenAPI YAML (v0.3)](sandbox:/mnt/data/openapi.v0_3.yaml)  
- [Download Postman Collection (v0.3)](sandbox:/mnt/data/postman_collection.v0_3.json)

### Что внутри (кратко, по делу)
**OpenAPI** включает:
- `POST /v1/deliveries` → создание delivery  
- `POST /v1/deliveries/{id}/artifacts` → artifact + presigned upload (quarantine)  
- `POST /v1/deliveries/{id}/submit` → запуск scan/policy  
- `GET /v1/deliveries/{id}/artifacts/{aid}/download` → presigned download + sha256  
- `POST /v1/deliveries/{id}/accept|reject` → escrow release/refund  
- review: list/claim/resolve  
- admin: quotas, dlq list/replay  
- dsar: export/erase  
- схемы: Delivery/Artifact/ReviewCase/DLQItem + ErrorResponse

**Postman collection** даёт готовые запросы под эти endpoints + переменные `{{baseUrl}}`, `{{delivery_id}}`, `{{artifact_id}}`, etc.

---

Если пишете снова **«Продолжение»**, следующим шагом я сделаю **код-скелет сервиса (TypeScript/NestJS или Fastify)**: роуты, транзакции, idempotency (dedupe_key), outbox dispatcher + DLQ + примеры SQL миграций под эти endpoints.

--- ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЬ ---
Продолжение

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Соберу следующий практический слой: минимальный сервис-скелет на TypeScript (Fastify) с роутами из OpenAPI, транзакциями Postgres, idempotency/dedupe_key, outbox-диспетчером, DLQ и миграциями SQL — всё готовым набором файлов.

```python
w(&quot;README.md&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  # Delivery Verification &amp; Escrow — skeleton (v0.3)

  Это минимальный, но боевой каркас сервиса на **TypeScript + Fastify + Postgres**:
  - Роуты: deliveries / artifacts / review / admin quotas / DLQ / DSAR
  - Транзакции в Postgres
  - Идемпотентность: `dedupe_key` и уникальные ограничения
  - Outbox + retries + DLQ (dead_letters)
  - Заглушки для storage (presigned URL) и policy (OPA/таблица можно подключить позже)

  ## Быстрый запуск (локально)
  1) `cp .env.example .env`
  2) `docker compose up -d db`
  3) `npm i`
  4) `npm run dev` (API)
  5) В другом окне: `npm run dev -- --worker` не нужно — есть отдельный worker:
     - `npm run build`
     - `npm run worker:outbox`

  ## Миграции
  - Файлы в `migrations/`
  - После `npm run build` можно: `npm run migrate`

  ## Важная практическая деталь про sha256_quarantine
  Сервис **не видит контент файла**, потому что upload идёт по presigned PUT.
  Поэтому sha256 должен прийти:
  - либо как `x-amz-meta-sha256` (в required_headers при presign),
  - либо (для MVP) клиент передаёт `X-File-Sha256` в `POST /submit`.
  В проде это можно заменить на S3 checksum / server-side verification.

  ## OpenAPI/Postman
  Используйте файлы из прошлой итерации (openapi.v0_3.yaml / postman_collection.v0_3.json)
  и настройте `baseUrl`.
  &quot;&quot;&quot;))

# docker-compose

        POSTGRES_DB: appdb
      ports:
        - &quot;5432:5432&quot;
      volumes:
        - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  volumes:
    pgdata:
  &quot;&quot;&quot;))

# migrations
w(&quot;migrations/001_init.sql&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  -- Core: tenants, deliveries, artifacts, blobs, reports, reviews, quotas, escrow, ledger, outbox, dlq
  CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name text NOT NULL,
    trust_tier int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_quotas (
    tenant_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    scans_per_min int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
    bytes_per_day bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000000000,
    max_inflight_scans int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
    updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deliveries (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
    title text,
    data_class text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;D1&#x27;,
    level text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;L0&#x27;,
    status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;submitted&#x27;,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    deleted_at timestamptz
  );
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deliveries_tenant_status ON deliveries(tenant_id, status, created_at);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artifacts (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
    delivery_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES deliveries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    filename text NOT NULL,
    size_bytes bigint NOT NULL,
    declared_mime text NOT NULL,
    kind text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;unknown&#x27;,
    status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;uploaded_quarantine&#x27;,
    sha256_quarantine text,
    sha256_released text,
    blob_sha256 text,
    quarantine_key text,
    released_key text,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    deleted_at timestamptz
  );
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_delivery ON artifacts(tenant_id, delivery_id, created_at);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blobs (
    sha256 text PRIMARY KEY,
    size_bytes bigint NOT NULL,
    ref_count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verification_reports (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid NOT NULL,
    delivery_id uuid NOT NULL,
    artifact_id uuid NOT NULL,
    verdict text NOT NULL, -- pass|fail|pending_review
    failure_code text,
    risk_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    signals jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{}&#x27;::jsonb,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_reports_delivery ON verification_reports(tenant_id, delivery_id, created_at);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_cases (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid NOT NULL,
    delivery_id uuid NOT NULL,
    artifact_id uuid NOT NULL,
    status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;pending&#x27;,
    reason_code text NOT NULL,
    risk_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    assigned_to uuid,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_review_tenant_status ON review_cases(tenant_id, status, created_at);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    case_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES review_cases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    actor_id uuid,
    action text NOT NULL,
    note text,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escrows (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
    delivery_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES deliveries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    amount_cents bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    currency text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;EUR&#x27;,
    status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;held&#x27;, -- held|release_requested|released|refund_requested|refunded
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );
  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_escrow_delivery ON escrows(delivery_id);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ledger_entries (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    escrow_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES escrows(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    entry_type text NOT NULL, -- release|refund
    dedupe_key text NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );
  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_ledger_dedupe ON ledger_entries(escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key);

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbox (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    tenant_id uuid,
    topic text NOT NULL,
    payload jsonb NOT NULL,
    dedupe_key text,
    attempts int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    available_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    locked_at timestamptz,
    locked_by text,
    last_error text,
    dead_at timestamptz,
    created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );
  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_outbox_dedupe ON outbox(dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL;
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_outbox_available ON outbox(available_at) WHERE dead_at IS NULL;

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbox_dead_letters (
    id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
    tenant_id uuid,
    topic text NOT NULL,
    payload jsonb NOT NULL,
    error text NOT NULL,
    attempts int NOT NULL,
    moved_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
  );

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumer_inbox (
    id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
    handler text NOT NULL,
    event_key text NOT NULL,
    processed_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    UNIQUE(handler, event_key)
  );
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# src utilities
w(&quot;src/config.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;

  const EnvSchema = z.object({
    NODE_ENV: z.string().default(&quot;development&quot;),
    PORT: z.coerce.number().default(8080),
    DATABASE_URL: z.string(),
    OUTBOX_WORKER_ID: z.string().default(&quot;worker-1&quot;),
    OUTBOX_BATCH: z.coerce.number().default(50),
    OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC: z.coerce.number().default(60),
    OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS: z.coerce.number().default(5),
    STORAGE_BASE_URL: z.string().default(&quot;https://storage.example.com&quot;),
    PRESIGN_TTL_SEC: z.coerce.number().default(600),
    POLICY_MODE: z.string().default(&quot;table&quot;),
  });

  export type AppConfig = z.infer&lt;typeof EnvSchema&gt;;

  export function loadConfig(): AppConfig {
    const env = {
      NODE_ENV: process.env.NODE_ENV,
      PORT: process.env.PORT,
      DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
      OUTBOX_WORKER_ID: process.env.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID,
      OUTBOX_BATCH: process.env.OUTBOX_BATCH,
      OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC: process.env.OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC,
      OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS: process.env.OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS,
      STORAGE_BASE_URL: process.env.STORAGE_BASE_URL,
      PRESIGN_TTL_SEC: process.env.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC,
      POLICY_MODE: process.env.POLICY_MODE,
    };
    return EnvSchema.parse(env);
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/db.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import pg from &quot;pg&quot;;
  const { Pool } = pg;

  export type Db = Pool;

  export function createDb(databaseUrl: string): Db {
    return new Pool({ connectionString: databaseUrl, max: 10 });
  }

  export async function withTx&lt;T&gt;(db: Db, fn: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;): Promise&lt;T&gt; {
    const client = await db.connect();
    try {
      await client.query(&quot;BEGIN&quot;);
      const res = await fn(client);
      await client.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
      return res;
    } catch (e) {
      await client.query(&quot;ROLLBACK&quot;);
      throw e;
    } finally {
      client.release();
    }
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/errors.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  export class AppError extends Error {
    constructor(
      public readonly code: string,
      message: string,
      public readonly status: number = 400,
      public readonly details?: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;
    ) {
      super(message);
    }
  }

  export function asErrorResponse(err: unknown, traceId?: string) {
    if (err instanceof AppError) {
      return {
        status: err.status,
        body: { error: err.code, message: err.message, details: err.details ?? {}, trace_id: traceId }
      };
    }
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : &quot;Unknown error&quot;;
    return { status: 500, body: { error: &quot;INTERNAL&quot;, message, details: {}, trace_id: traceId } };
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/validation.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { ZodSchema } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;./errors.js&quot;;

  export function parseBody&lt;T&gt;(schema: ZodSchema&lt;T&gt;, body: unknown): T {
    const r = schema.safeParse(body);
    if (!r.success) {
      throw new AppError(&quot;VALIDATION_ERROR&quot;, &quot;Invalid request body&quot;, 400, { issues: r.error.issues });
    }
    return r.data;
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# services: storage (stub presign)
w(&quot;src/services/storage.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import crypto from &quot;node:crypto&quot;;

  export type PresignPutResult = { url: string; expiresInSec: number; requiredHeaders: Record&lt;string, string&gt; };
  export type PresignGetResult = { url: string; expiresInSec: number };

  export interface StorageProvider {
    presignPut(key: string, contentType: string, expiresInSec: number, meta?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;): Promise&lt;PresignPutResult&gt;;
    presignGet(key: string, expiresInSec: number): Promise&lt;PresignGetResult&gt;;
  }

  // Заглушка: генерирует детерминированный URL без реальной подписи.
  export class StubStorage implements StorageProvider {
    constructor(private readonly baseUrl: string) {}

    async presignPut(key: string, contentType: string, expiresInSec: number, meta?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;): Promise&lt;PresignPutResult&gt; {
      const token = crypto.createHash(&quot;sha256&quot;).update(`PUT:${key}:${expiresInSec}`).digest(&quot;hex&quot;).slice(0, 32);
      const url = `${this.baseUrl}/put/${encodeURIComponent(key)}?token=${token}&amp;exp=${expiresInSec}`;
      const requiredHeaders: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = { &quot;Content-Type&quot;: contentType };
      // В проде тут будет x-amz-meta-sha256 и прочие метаданные.
      if (meta) {
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(meta)) requiredHeaders[k] = v;
      }
      return { url, expiresInSec, requiredHeaders };
    }

    async presignGet(key: string, expiresInSec: number): Promise&lt;PresignGetResult&gt; {
      const token = crypto.createHash(&quot;sha256&quot;).update(`GET:${key}:${expiresInSec}`).digest(&quot;hex&quot;).slice(0, 32);
      const url = `${this.baseUrl}/get/${encodeURIComponent(key)}?token=${token}&amp;exp=${expiresInSec}`;
      return { url, expiresInSec };
    }
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# services: policy (stub)
w(&quot;src/services/policy.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  export type PolicyInput = {
    tenant_id: string;
    data_class: &quot;D0&quot;|&quot;D1&quot;|&quot;D2&quot;|&quot;D3&quot;;
    level: &quot;L0&quot;|&quot;L1&quot;|&quot;L2&quot;;
    file: { kind: string; size_bytes: number; declared_mime: string; sha256?: string|null };
    signals: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;
  };

  export type PolicyDecision = {
    allow: boolean;
    action: &quot;deny&quot;|&quot;scan_only&quot;|&quot;extract_text&quot;|&quot;allow&quot;;
    review: { required: boolean; reason: string|null };
    limits: { max_wall_time_ms?: number; max_depth?: number; max_uncompressed_bytes?: number };
    failure_code?: string|null;
  };

  // MVP: простейшая политика (аналог табличной), без OPA.
  export function decide(input: PolicyInput): PolicyDecision {
    if (input.file.size_bytes &gt; 500_000_000) {
      return { allow: false, action: &quot;deny&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: {}, failure_code: &quot;FILE_TOO_LARGE&quot; };
    }
    if (input.file.kind === &quot;zip&quot; &amp;&amp; input.data_class === &quot;D0&quot;) {
      return { allow: false, action: &quot;deny&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: {}, failure_code: &quot;ZIP_BLOCKED_FOR_D0&quot; };
    }
    const pdfJs = Boolean((input.signals as any).pdf_js);
    if (input.file.kind === &quot;pdf&quot; &amp;&amp; pdfJs &amp;&amp; input.data_class !== &quot;D0&quot;) {
      return { allow: true, action: &quot;scan_only&quot;, review: { required: true, reason: &quot;PDF_SUSPICIOUS_ACTIVE_CONTENT&quot; }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 5000 } };
    }
    // База: D2/L1 -&gt; extract_text, иначе scan_only
    if (input.data_class === &quot;D2&quot; &amp;&amp; input.level === &quot;L1&quot;) {
      return { allow: true, action: &quot;extract_text&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 10000, max_depth: 1, max_uncompressed_bytes: 200_000_000 } };
    }
    return { allow: true, action: &quot;scan_only&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 7000, max_depth: 1 } };
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# outbox helper
w(&quot;src/services/outbox.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import type pg from &quot;pg&quot;;

  export async function outboxInsert(
    client: pg.PoolClient,
    topic: string,
    payload: unknown,
    tenantId?: string|null,
    dedupeKey?: string|null,
    availableAt?: Date
  ) {
    await client.query(
      `INSERT INTO outbox (tenant_id, topic, payload, dedupe_key, available_at)
       VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4, COALESCE($5, now()))
       ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
      [tenantId ?? null, topic, JSON.stringify(payload), dedupeKey ?? null, availableAt ?? null]
    );
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# routes
w(&quot;src/routes/deliveries.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

  const CreateDeliverySchema = z.object({
    title: z.string().optional(),
    data_class: z.enum([&quot;D0&quot;,&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;D3&quot;]).default(&quot;D1&quot;),
    level: z.enum([&quot;L0&quot;,&quot;L1&quot;,&quot;L2&quot;]).default(&quot;L0&quot;)
  });

  export async function deliveriesRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const body = parseBody(CreateDeliverySchema, req.body);
      const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO deliveries (tenant_id, title, data_class, level)
           VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
           RETURNING *`,
          [tenantId, body.title ?? null, body.data_class, body.level]
        );
        // гарантируем наличие quotas row
        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO tenant_quotas (tenant_id) VALUES ($1)
           ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO NOTHING`,
          [tenantId]
        );
        return d.rows[0];
      });

      reply.code(201).send({ delivery: res });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
      reply.send({ delivery: r.rows[0] });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/submit&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
      // (MVP) можно передать sha256 на submit как X-File-Sha256 (если не смогли передать в meta)
      const shaHeader = req.headers[&quot;x-file-sha256&quot;] as string | undefined;

      const updated = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(
          `SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`,
          [tenantId, deliveryId]
        );
        if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);

        const a = await c.query(
          `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`,
          [tenantId, deliveryId]
        );
        if (a.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NO_ARTIFACTS&quot;, &quot;No artifacts in delivery&quot;, 409);

        // заполним sha256_quarantine, если прислали один и он один артефакт
        if (shaHeader &amp;&amp; a.rowCount === 1 &amp;&amp; !a.rows[0].sha256_quarantine) {
          await c.query(
            `UPDATE artifacts SET sha256_quarantine=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2 AND tenant_id=$3`,
            [shaHeader, a.rows[0].id, tenantId]
          );
          a.rows[0].sha256_quarantine = shaHeader;
        }

        const missing = a.rows.filter(x =&gt; !x.sha256_quarantine);
        if (missing.length) {
          throw new AppError(&quot;MISSING_SHA256&quot;, &quot;sha256_quarantine required for all artifacts (use upload meta or X-File-Sha256 for single artifact)&quot;, 409, {
            missing_artifact_ids: missing.map(m =&gt; m.id)
          });
        }

        // enqueue scan events per artifact
        for (const art of a.rows) {
          await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scan_in_progress&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [art.id, tenantId]);
          const dedupe = `scan:${tenantId}:${deliveryId}:${art.id}:${art.sha256_quarantine}`;
          await outboxInsert(c, &quot;scan.artifact_requested.v1&quot;, {
            tenant_id: tenantId,
            delivery_id: deliveryId,
            artifact_id: art.id,
            sha256_quarantine: art.sha256_quarantine,
            declared_mime: art.declared_mime,
            size_bytes: Number(art.size_bytes),
            filename: art.filename,
            data_class: d.rows[0].data_class,
            level: d.rows[0].level
          }, tenantId, dedupe);
        }

        // delivery stays submitted until scan resolves; optionally mark scan_in_progress via separate status if you add it
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

        // ensure escrow exists (MVP: 0 amount)
        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO escrows (tenant_id, delivery_id, amount_cents, currency)
           VALUES ($1, $2, 0, &#x27;EUR&#x27;)
           ON CONFLICT (delivery_id) DO NOTHING`,
          [tenantId, deliveryId]
        );

        const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
        return out.rows[0];
      });

      reply.code(202).send({ delivery: updated });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/accept&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

      const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
        if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
        if (d.rows[0].status !== &quot;verified_pass&quot; &amp;&amp; d.rows[0].status !== &quot;accepted&quot;) {
          throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Delivery must be verified_pass to accept&quot;, 409, { status: d.rows[0].status });
        }

        const e = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM escrows WHERE delivery_id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [deliveryId]);
        if (e.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;ESCROW_MISSING&quot;, &quot;Escrow missing&quot;, 409);

        // idempotent ledger entry
        const dedupe = `release:${deliveryId}`;
        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO ledger_entries (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key)
           VALUES ($1, &#x27;release&#x27;, $2)
           ON CONFLICT (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
          [e.rows[0].id, dedupe]
        );

        await c.query(`UPDATE escrows SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1`, [e.rows[0].id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;accepted&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

        const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
        return out.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ delivery: res });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/reject&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

      const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
        if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
        if (d.rows[0].status === &quot;accepted&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Cannot reject accepted delivery&quot;, 409);

        const e = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM escrows WHERE delivery_id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [deliveryId]);
        if (e.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;ESCROW_MISSING&quot;, &quot;Escrow missing&quot;, 409);

        const dedupe = `refund:${deliveryId}`;
        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO ledger_entries (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key)
           VALUES ($1, &#x27;refund&#x27;, $2)
           ON CONFLICT (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
          [e.rows[0].id, dedupe]
        );

        await c.query(`UPDATE escrows SET status=&#x27;refunded&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1`, [e.rows[0].id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;rejected&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

        const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
        return out.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ delivery: res });
    });
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/routes/artifacts.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;

  const CreateArtifactSchema = z.object({
    filename: z.string().min(1),
    size_bytes: z.number().int().positive(),
    declared_mime: z.string().min(1)
  });

  function guessKind(filename: string, mime: string): string {
    const f = filename.toLowerCase();
    if (mime.includes(&quot;pdf&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) return &quot;pdf&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;zip&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.zip&quot;)) return &quot;zip&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;word&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.docx&quot;)) return &quot;docx&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;text&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.txt&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.md&quot;)) return &quot;text&quot;;
    return &quot;unknown&quot;;
  }

  export async function artifactsRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
      const body = parseBody(CreateArtifactSchema, req.body);

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
        if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
        if (d.rows[0].status !== &quot;submitted&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Delivery not in submitted state&quot;, 409, { status: d.rows[0].status });

        const kind = guessKind(body.filename, body.declared_mime);
        const key = `quarantine/${tenantId}/${deliveryId}/${cryptoRandom(12)}_${sanitize(body.filename)}`;

        const r = await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO artifacts (tenant_id, delivery_id, filename, size_bytes, declared_mime, kind, quarantine_key)
           VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7)
           RETURNING *`,
          [tenantId, deliveryId, body.filename, body.size_bytes, body.declared_mime, kind, key]
        );

        // storage presign (stub) — просим клиента добавить sha256 в метаданные
        const presign = await app.storage.presignPut(key, body.declared_mime, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC, {
          &quot;x-amz-meta-sha256&quot;: &quot;&lt;client_sha256_here&gt;&quot;
        });

        return { artifact: r.rows[0], presign };
      });

      reply.code(201).send({
        artifact: out.artifact,
        upload_url: out.presign.url,
        expires_in_sec: out.presign.expiresInSec,
        required_headers: out.presign.requiredHeaders
      });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );
      reply.send({ artifacts: r.rows });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts/:artifact_id/download&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const { delivery_id, artifact_id } = req.params as any;

      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND id=$3 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
        [tenantId, delivery_id, artifact_id]
      );
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Artifact not found&quot;, 404);
      const art = r.rows[0];
      if (art.status !== &quot;released&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Artifact not released&quot;, 403, { status: art.status });

      const presign = await app.storage.presignGet(art.released_key ?? art.quarantine_key, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC);
      reply.send({
        url: presign.url,
        expires_in_sec: presign.expiresInSec,
        sha256: art.sha256_released ?? art.sha256_quarantine,
        size_bytes: Number(art.size_bytes),
        filename: art.filename
      });
    });
  }

  function sanitize(name: string) {
    return name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/g, &quot;_&quot;).slice(0, 120);
  }
  function cryptoRandom(n: number) {
    return [...crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(n))].map(b =&gt; b.toString(16).padStart(2,&quot;0&quot;)).join(&quot;&quot;);
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# Note: crypto.getRandomValues is web API; in node use crypto.randomBytes. We&#x27;ll patch.
# Let&#x27;s correct artifactsRoutes accordingly.
w(&quot;src/routes/artifacts.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import crypto from &quot;node:crypto&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;

  const CreateArtifactSchema = z.object({
    filename: z.string().min(1),
    size_bytes: z.number().int().positive(),
    declared_mime: z.string().min(1)
  });

  function guessKind(filename: string, mime: string): string {
    const f = filename.toLowerCase();
    if (mime.includes(&quot;pdf&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) return &quot;pdf&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;zip&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.zip&quot;)) return &quot;zip&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;word&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.docx&quot;)) return &quot;docx&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;text&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.txt&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.md&quot;)) return &quot;text&quot;;
    return &quot;unknown&quot;;
  }

  export async function artifactsRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
      const body = parseBody(CreateArtifactSchema, req.body);

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
        if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
        if (d.rows[0].status !== &quot;submitted&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Delivery not in submitted state&quot;, 409, { status: d.rows[0].status });

        const kind = guessKind(body.filename, body.declared_mime);
        const key = `quarantine/${tenantId}/${deliveryId}/${crypto.randomBytes(8).toString(&quot;hex&quot;)}_${sanitize(body.filename)}`;

        const r = await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO artifacts (tenant_id, delivery_id, filename, size_bytes, declared_mime, kind, quarantine_key)
           VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7)
           RETURNING *`,
          [tenantId, deliveryId, body.filename, body.size_bytes, body.declared_mime, kind, key]
        );

        // storage presign (stub) — просим клиента добавить sha256 в метаданные
        const presign = await app.storage.presignPut(key, body.declared_mime, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC, {
          &quot;x-amz-meta-sha256&quot;: &quot;&lt;client_sha256_here&gt;&quot;
        });

        return { artifact: r.rows[0], presign };
      });

      reply.code(201).send({
        artifact: out.artifact,
        upload_url: out.presign.url,
        expires_in_sec: out.presign.expiresInSec,
        required_headers: out.presign.requiredHeaders
      });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );
      reply.send({ artifacts: r.rows });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts/:artifact_id/download&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const { delivery_id, artifact_id } = req.params as any;

      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND id=$3 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
        [tenantId, delivery_id, artifact_id]
      );
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Artifact not found&quot;, 404);
      const art = r.rows[0];
      if (art.status !== &quot;released&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Artifact not released&quot;, 403, { status: art.status });

      const presign = await app.storage.presignGet(art.released_key ?? art.quarantine_key, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC);
      reply.send({
        url: presign.url,
        expires_in_sec: presign.expiresInSec,
        sha256: art.sha256_released ?? art.sha256_quarantine,
        size_bytes: Number(art.size_bytes),
        filename: art.filename
      });
    });
  }

  function sanitize(name: string) {
    return name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/g, &quot;_&quot;).slice(0, 120);
  }
```
