# review routes
w(&quot;src/routes/review.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

  const ResolveSchema = z.object({
    resolution: z.enum([&quot;approve&quot;,&quot;reject&quot;,&quot;request_redaction&quot;]),
    note: z.string().optional()
  });

  export async function reviewRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    app.get(&quot;/v1/review/cases&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const r = await app.db.query(
        `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200`,
        [tenantId]
      );
      reply.send({ cases: r.rows });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/review/cases/:case_id/claim&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      const actorId = req.headers[&quot;x-actor-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      if (!actorId) throw new AppError(&quot;ACTOR_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Actor-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const caseId = (req.params as any).case_id as string;

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const r = await c.query(
          `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`,
          [tenantId, caseId]
        );
        if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Case not found&quot;, 404);
        if (r.rows[0].status !== &quot;pending&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Case not pending&quot;, 409, { status: r.rows[0].status });

        await c.query(
          `UPDATE review_cases SET status=&#x27;in_progress&#x27;, assigned_to=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`,
          [actorId, caseId]
        );
        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO review_actions (case_id, actor_id, action, note) VALUES ($1,$2,&#x27;assign&#x27;,$3)`,
          [caseId, actorId, null]
        );
        const out2 = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE id=$1`, [caseId]);
        return out2.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ case: out });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/review/cases/:case_id/resolve&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      const actorId = req.headers[&quot;x-actor-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
      if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
      if (!actorId) throw new AppError(&quot;ACTOR_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Actor-Id header&quot;, 401);

      const caseId = (req.params as any).case_id as string;
      const body = parseBody(ResolveSchema, req.body);

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const r = await c.query(
          `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`,
          [tenantId, caseId]
        );
        if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Case not found&quot;, 404);
        if (![&quot;in_progress&quot;,&quot;pending&quot;].includes(r.rows[0].status)) {
          throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Case not resolvable&quot;, 409, { status: r.rows[0].status });
        }

        const newStatus = body.resolution === &quot;approve&quot; ? &quot;approved&quot; : (body.resolution === &quot;reject&quot; ? &quot;rejected&quot; : &quot;redacted&quot;);
        await c.query(`UPDATE review_cases SET status=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`, [newStatus, caseId]);
        await c.query(`INSERT INTO review_actions (case_id, actor_id, action, note) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4)`,
          [caseId, actorId, body.resolution, body.note ?? null]
        );

        // событие на обработку решения (реальные side-effects делаются воркером)
        await outboxInsert(c, &quot;review.case_resolved.v1&quot;, {
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          case_id: caseId,
          resolution: body.resolution
        }, tenantId, `review_resolve:${tenantId}:${caseId}:${body.resolution}`);

        const out2 = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE id=$1`, [caseId]);
        return out2.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ case: out });
    });
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# admin routes: quotas + dlq
w(&quot;src/routes/admin.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

  const QuotaSchema = z.object({
    tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
    scans_per_min: z.number().int().positive(),
    bytes_per_day: z.number().int().positive(),
    max_inflight_scans: z.number().int().positive()
  });

  export async function adminRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    // простая &quot;admin&quot; защита для MVP: X-Admin: true
    function requireAdmin(req: any) {
      if ((req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase() !== &quot;true&quot;) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin only&quot;, 403);
      }
    }

    app.put(&quot;/v1/admin/tenants/:tenant_id/quotas&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const tenantIdParam = (req.params as any).tenant_id as string;
      const body = parseBody(QuotaSchema, req.body);
      if (tenantIdParam !== body.tenant_id) throw new AppError(&quot;VALIDATION_ERROR&quot;, &quot;tenant_id mismatch&quot;, 400);

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const t = await c.query(`SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [body.tenant_id]);
        if (t.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Tenant not found&quot;, 404);

        const q = await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO tenant_quotas (tenant_id, scans_per_min, bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans, updated_at)
           VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,now())
           ON CONFLICT (tenant_id)
           DO UPDATE SET scans_per_min=EXCLUDED.scans_per_min, bytes_per_day=EXCLUDED.bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans=EXCLUDED.max_inflight_scans, updated_at=now()
           RETURNING *`,
          [body.tenant_id, body.scans_per_min, body.bytes_per_day, body.max_inflight_scans]
        );
        return q.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ quota: out });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const r = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters ORDER BY moved_at DESC LIMIT 200`);
      reply.send({ items: r.rows });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq/:id/replay&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const id = (req.params as any).id as string;

      const ok = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const r = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [id]);
        if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;DLQ item not found&quot;, 404);

        const item = r.rows[0];
        // реплей как новое outbox событие (dedupe_key можно оставить null или сделать на основе id)
        await outboxInsert(c, item.topic, item.payload, item.tenant_id, `dlq_replay:${id}:${Date.now()}`);
        await c.query(`DELETE FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1`, [id]);
        return True
      });

      reply.code(202).send({ replayed: True });
    });
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# Fix Python True/False in TS; patch admin replay.
w(&quot;src/routes/admin.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
  import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

  const QuotaSchema = z.object({
    tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
    scans_per_min: z.number().int().positive(),
    bytes_per_day: z.number().int().positive(),
    max_inflight_scans: z.number().int().positive()
  });

  export async function adminRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    function requireAdmin(req: any) {
      if ((req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase() !== &quot;true&quot;) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin only&quot;, 403);
      }
    }

    app.put(&quot;/v1/admin/tenants/:tenant_id/quotas&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const tenantIdParam = (req.params as any).tenant_id as string;
      const body = parseBody(QuotaSchema, req.body);
      if (tenantIdParam !== body.tenant_id) throw new AppError(&quot;VALIDATION_ERROR&quot;, &quot;tenant_id mismatch&quot;, 400);

      const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const t = await c.query(`SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [body.tenant_id]);
        if (t.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Tenant not found&quot;, 404);

        const q = await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO tenant_quotas (tenant_id, scans_per_min, bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans, updated_at)
           VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,now())
           ON CONFLICT (tenant_id)
           DO UPDATE SET scans_per_min=EXCLUDED.scans_per_min, bytes_per_day=EXCLUDED.bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans=EXCLUDED.max_inflight_scans, updated_at=now()
           RETURNING *`,
          [body.tenant_id, body.scans_per_min, body.bytes_per_day, body.max_inflight_scans]
        );
        return q.rows[0];
      });

      reply.send({ quota: out });
    });

    app.get(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const r = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters ORDER BY moved_at DESC LIMIT 200`);
      reply.send({ items: r.rows });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq/:id/replay&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const id = (req.params as any).id as string;

      await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        const r = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [id]);
        if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;DLQ item not found&quot;, 404);

        const item = r.rows[0];
        await outboxInsert(c, item.topic, item.payload, item.tenant_id, `dlq_replay:${id}:${Date.now()}`);
        await c.query(`DELETE FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1`, [id]);
      });

      reply.code(202).send({ replayed: true });
    });
  }

# DSAR routes
w(&quot;src/routes/dsar.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
  import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

  export async function dsarRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
    // MVP: subject_id — произвольная строка, админ/служебный вызов
    function requireAdmin(req: any) {
      if ((req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase() !== &quot;true&quot;) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin only&quot;, 403);
      }
    }

    app.post(&quot;/v1/dsar/subjects/:subject_id/export&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const subjectId = (req.params as any).subject_id as string;

      // В проде: сбор данных по subjectId -&gt; формирование файла -&gt; presign GET.
      // Здесь: ставим в outbox задачу и возвращаем заглушку.
      await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        await outboxInsert(c, &quot;dsar.export_requested.v1&quot;, { subject_id: subjectId }, null, `dsar_export:${subjectId}:${Date.now()}`);
      });

      reply.code(202).send({
        subject_id: subjectId,
        export_url: `${app.config.STORAGE_BASE_URL}/exports/${encodeURIComponent(subjectId)}.json`,
        expires_in_sec: app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC
      });
    });

    app.post(&quot;/v1/dsar/subjects/:subject_id/erase&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
      requireAdmin(req);
      const subjectId = (req.params as any).subject_id as string;

      await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
        await outboxInsert(c, &quot;dsar.erase_requested.v1&quot;, { subject_id: subjectId }, null, `dsar_erase:${subjectId}:${Date.now()}`);
      });

      reply.code(202).send({ queued: true });
    });
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# app and server
w(&quot;src/app.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import Fastify from &quot;fastify&quot;;
  import cors from &quot;@fastify/cors&quot;;
  import helmet from &quot;@fastify/helmet&quot;;
  import requestContext from &quot;@fastify/request-context&quot;;
  import { loadConfig } from &quot;./config.js&quot;;
  import { createDb } from &quot;./db.js&quot;;
  import { asErrorResponse } from &quot;./errors.js&quot;;
  import { StubStorage } from &quot;./services/storage.js&quot;;
  import { deliveriesRoutes } from &quot;./routes/deliveries.js&quot;;
  import { artifactsRoutes } from &quot;./routes/artifacts.js&quot;;
  import { reviewRoutes } from &quot;./routes/review.js&quot;;
  import { adminRoutes } from &quot;./routes/admin.js&quot;;
  import { dsarRoutes } from &quot;./routes/dsar.js&quot;;

  declare module &quot;fastify&quot; {
    interface FastifyInstance {
      config: ReturnType&lt;typeof loadConfig&gt;;
      db: ReturnType&lt;typeof createDb&gt;;
      storage: StubStorage;
    }
  }

  export function buildApp() {
    const config = loadConfig();
    const app = Fastify({ logger: true });
    app.decorate(&quot;config&quot;, config);
    app.decorate(&quot;db&quot;, createDb(config.DATABASE_URL));
    app.decorate(&quot;storage&quot;, new StubStorage(config.STORAGE_BASE_URL));

    app.register(requestContext, { hook: &quot;onRequest&quot; });
    app.register(cors, { origin: true });
    app.register(helmet);

    app.setErrorHandler((err, req, reply) =&gt; {
      const traceId = (req.headers[&quot;x-request-id&quot;] as string) ?? undefined;
      const r = asErrorResponse(err, traceId);
      reply.code(r.status).send(r.body);
    });

    app.get(&quot;/healthz&quot;, async () =&gt; ({ ok: true }));

    app.register(deliveriesRoutes);
    app.register(artifactsRoutes);
    app.register(reviewRoutes);
    app.register(adminRoutes);
    app.register(dsarRoutes);

    return app;
  }
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/server.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { buildApp } from &quot;./app.js&quot;;

  const app = buildApp();
  const port = app.config.PORT;

  app.listen({ port, host: &quot;0.0.0.0&quot; })
    .then(() =&gt; app.log.info({ port }, &quot;API listening&quot;))
    .catch((e) =&gt; {
      app.log.error(e);
      process.exit(1);
    });

# migrations runner
w(&quot;src/scripts/migrate.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import fs from &quot;node:fs&quot;;
  import path from &quot;node:path&quot;;
  import { fileURLToPath } from &quot;node:url&quot;;
  import { loadConfig } from &quot;../config.js&quot;;
  import { createDb } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;

  const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
  const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

  async function main() {
    const config = loadConfig();
    const db = createDb(config.DATABASE_URL);
    const migrationsDir = path.resolve(__dirname, &quot;../../migrations&quot;);
    const files = fs.readdirSync(migrationsDir).filter(f =&gt; f.endsWith(&quot;.sql&quot;)).sort();

    for (const f of files) {
      const sql = fs.readFileSync(path.join(migrationsDir, f), &quot;utf-8&quot;);
      console.log(&quot;Applying&quot;, f);
      await db.query(sql);
    }
    await db.end();
    console.log(&quot;Done.&quot;);
  }

  main().catch((e) =&gt; { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# outbox dispatcher worker + handlers
w(&quot;src/workers/outbox_dispatcher.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  import { loadConfig } from &quot;../config.js&quot;;
  import { createDb, withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
  import { decide } from &quot;../services/policy.js&quot;;
  import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;

  type OutboxRow = {
    id: string;
    tenant_id: string | null;
    topic: string;
    payload: any;
    attempts: number;
  };

  function sleep(ms: number) {
    return new Promise((r) =&gt; setTimeout(r, ms));
  }

  function classifyError(e: unknown): &quot;TRANSIENT&quot;|&quot;PERMANENT&quot;|&quot;POISON&quot; {
    if (e instanceof AppError) return &quot;PERMANENT&quot;;
    return &quot;TRANSIENT&quot;;
  }

  function backoffMs(attempt: number) {
    const base = 2000;
    const max = 5 * 60 * 1000;
    const exp = Math.min(max, base * Math.pow(2, attempt));
    const jitter = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000);
    return exp + jitter;
  }

  async function handleScanArtifact(db: any, row: OutboxRow) {
    // MVP &quot;скан&quot;: без чтения файла. Генерируем сигналы по расширению/именам.
    const p = row.payload as any;
    const filename = (p.filename ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase();
    const signals: any = {};
    if (filename.includes(&quot;js&quot;) &amp;&amp; filename.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) signals.pdf_js = true;

    const policy = decide({
      tenant_id: p.tenant_id,
      data_class: p.data_class,
      level: p.level,
      file: { kind: guessKind(filename, p.declared_mime), size_bytes: p.size_bytes, declared_mime: p.declared_mime, sha256: p.sha256_quarantine },
      signals
    });

    const verdict = !policy.allow ? &quot;fail&quot; : (policy.review.required ? &quot;pending_review&quot; : &quot;pass&quot;);
    const failure_code = policy.allow ? null : (policy.failure_code ?? &quot;POLICY_DENY&quot;);
    const risk_score = policy.review.required ? 60 : 10;

    await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
      // report
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO verification_reports (tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, verdict, failure_code, risk_score, signals)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7::jsonb)`,
        [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id, p.artifact_id, verdict, failure_code, risk_score, JSON.stringify(signals)]
      );

      if (verdict === &quot;fail&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scanned_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);
      } else if (verdict === &quot;pending_review&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;released_pending_review&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verification_pending_review&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);

        await c.query(
          `INSERT INTO review_cases (tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, status, reason_code, risk_score)
           VALUES ($1,$2,$3,&#x27;pending&#x27;,$4,$5)
           ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`,
          [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id, p.artifact_id, policy.review.reason ?? &quot;REVIEW_REQUIRED&quot;, risk_score]
        );
      } else {
        // pass: &quot;release&quot; (MVP: используем quarantine_key как released_key)
        await c.query(
          `UPDATE artifacts
           SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, sha256_released=sha256_quarantine, released_key=quarantine_key, updated_at=now()
           WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`,
          [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]
        );
        // delivery pass только если ВСЕ artifacts released
        const cnt = await c.query(
          `SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total,
                  SUM(CASE WHEN status=&#x27;released&#x27; THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS released
           FROM artifacts
           WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
          [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]
        );
        if (cnt.rows[0].total === cnt.rows[0].released) {
          await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_pass&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  async function handleReviewResolved(db: any, row: OutboxRow) {
    const p = row.payload as any;
    await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
      const rc = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`, [p.tenant_id, p.case_id]);
      if (rc.rowCount === 0) return;

      const caseRow = rc.rows[0];
      if (p.resolution === &quot;approve&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, sha256_released=sha256_quarantine, released_key=quarantine_key, updated_at=now()
                       WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.artifact_id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_pass&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.delivery_id]);
      } else if (p.resolution === &quot;reject&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scanned_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.artifact_id]);
        await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.delivery_id]);
      } else {
        // request_redaction -&gt; тут мог бы запускаться пайплайн redaction; MVP: просто оставляем approved=redacted уже в case.
      }
    });
  }

  function guessKind(filename: string, mime: string) {
    const f = filename.toLowerCase();
    if (mime.includes(&quot;pdf&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) return &quot;pdf&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;zip&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.zip&quot;)) return &quot;zip&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;word&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.docx&quot;)) return &quot;docx&quot;;
    if (mime.includes(&quot;text&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.txt&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.md&quot;)) return &quot;text&quot;;
    return &quot;unknown&quot;;
  }

  async function main() {
    const config = loadConfig();
    const db = createDb(config.DATABASE_URL);
    console.log(&quot;outbox worker starting&quot;, { id: config.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID });

    while (true) {
      const rows: OutboxRow[] = await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
        const r = await c.query(
          `SELECT id, tenant_id, topic, payload, attempts
           FROM outbox
           WHERE dead_at IS NULL
             AND available_at &lt;= now()
             AND (locked_at IS NULL OR locked_at &lt; now() - ($1 || &#x27; seconds&#x27;)::interval)
           ORDER BY created_at
           FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
           LIMIT $2`,
          [config.OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC, config.OUTBOX_BATCH]
        );
        for (const row of r.rows) {
          await c.query(`UPDATE outbox SET locked_at=now(), locked_by=$1 WHERE id=$2`, [config.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID, row.id]);
        }
        return r.rows;
      });

      if (!rows.length) {
        await sleep(250);
        continue;
      }

      for (const row of rows) {
        try {
          if (row.topic === &quot;scan.artifact_requested.v1&quot;) {
            await handleScanArtifact(db, row);
          } else if (row.topic === &quot;review.case_resolved.v1&quot;) {
            await handleReviewResolved(db, row);
          } else {
            // неизвестный topic: в DLQ как poison (после пары попыток)
            throw new Error(`Unknown topic: ${row.topic}`);
          }

          await db.query(`DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id=$1`, [row.id]);
        } catch (e) {
          const kind = classifyError(e);
          if (kind === &quot;PERMANENT&quot;) {
            // permanent -&gt; move to DLQ immediately
            await moveToDlq(db, row, e);
            await db.query(`DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id=$1`, [row.id]);
            continue;
          }

          const attempts = row.attempts + 1;
          if (attempts &gt;= config.OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
            await moveToDlq(db, row, e);
            await db.query(`DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id=$1`, [row.id]);
          } else {
            const delay = backoffMs(attempts);
            await db.query(
              `UPDATE outbox SET attempts=$2, last_error=$3, available_at=now() + ($4 || &#x27; milliseconds&#x27;)::interval, locked_at=NULL, locked_by=NULL
               WHERE id=$1`,
              [row.id, attempts, (e instanceof Error ? e.message : &quot;error&quot;), delay]
            );
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  async function moveToDlq(db: any, row: OutboxRow, e: unknown) {
    const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : &quot;error&quot;;
    await db.query(
      `INSERT INTO outbox_dead_letters (id, tenant_id, topic, payload, error, attempts)
       VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4::jsonb,$5,$6)
       ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING`,
      [row.id, row.tenant_id, row.topic, JSON.stringify(row.payload), msg, row.attempts]
    );
  }

  main().catch((e) =&gt; { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
from pathlib import Path
import textwrap, json, zipfile

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)
proj = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton&quot;
if proj.exists():
    # clean existing
    for p in sorted(proj.rglob(&quot;*&quot;), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        elif p.is_dir():
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
else:
    proj.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def w(rel, content):
    p = proj / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

w(&quot;README.md&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
# Delivery Verification &amp; Escrow — skeleton (v0.3)

Минимальный, но практичный каркас сервиса на **TypeScript + Fastify + Postgres**:

- API: deliveries / artifacts / review / admin quotas / DLQ / DSAR
- Транзакции Postgres
- Идемпотентность: `dedupe_key` и уникальные индексы
- Outbox + retries + DLQ
- Заглушки для storage (presigned URL) и policy (OPA/таблица можно подключить позже)

## Быстрый запуск
1) `cp .env.example .env`
2) `docker compose up -d db`
3) `npm i`
4) `npm run dev` (API на :8080)
5) Миграции:
   - `npm run build`
   - `npm run migrate`
6) Воркер outbox:
   - `npm run worker:outbox`

## Важная деталь про sha256_quarantine
Сервис **не видит контент файла**, потому что upload идёт по presigned PUT.
Поэтому sha256 должен прийти:
- либо как метаданные при upload (`x-amz-meta-sha256`) — то, что мы указываем в `required_headers`,
- либо (MVP) единым хедером `X-File-Sha256` в `POST /v1/deliveries/{id}/submit` (если 1 файл и sha не заполнен).

В проде: S3 checksum / server-side verification / callback от storage.

## Как тестировать быстро
- Создайте tenant (в БД вручную, или добавьте свою админ-ручку).
- В каждом запросе передавайте `X-Tenant-Id: &lt;uuid&gt;`.
- Для review используйте `X-Actor-Id: &lt;uuid&gt;`.
- Админ-ручки: `X-Admin: true`.

&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;migrations/001_init.sql&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
-- Core: tenants, deliveries, artifacts, blobs, reports, reviews, quotas, escrow, ledger, outbox, dlq
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name text NOT NULL,
  trust_tier int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_quotas (
  tenant_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  scans_per_min int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  bytes_per_day bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000000000,
  max_inflight_scans int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deliveries (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  title text,
  data_class text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;D1&#x27;,
  level text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;L0&#x27;,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;submitted&#x27;,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at timestamptz
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deliveries_tenant_status ON deliveries(tenant_id, status, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artifacts (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  delivery_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES deliveries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  filename text NOT NULL,
  size_bytes bigint NOT NULL,
  declared_mime text NOT NULL,
  kind text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;unknown&#x27;,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;uploaded_quarantine&#x27;,
  sha256_quarantine text,
  sha256_released text,
  blob_sha256 text,
  quarantine_key text,
  released_key text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at timestamptz
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_delivery ON artifacts(tenant_id, delivery_id, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blobs (
  sha256 text PRIMARY KEY,
  size_bytes bigint NOT NULL,
  ref_count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verification_reports (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid NOT NULL,
  delivery_id uuid NOT NULL,
  artifact_id uuid NOT NULL,
  verdict text NOT NULL, -- pass|fail|pending_review
  failure_code text,
  risk_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  signals jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{}&#x27;::jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_reports_delivery ON verification_reports(tenant_id, delivery_id, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_cases (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid NOT NULL,
  delivery_id uuid NOT NULL,
  artifact_id uuid NOT NULL,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;pending&#x27;,
  reason_code text NOT NULL,
  risk_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  assigned_to uuid,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_review_tenant_status ON review_cases(tenant_id, status, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  case_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES review_cases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  actor_id uuid,
  action text NOT NULL,
  note text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escrows (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  delivery_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES deliveries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  amount_cents bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  currency text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;EUR&#x27;,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;held&#x27;, -- held|release_requested|released|refund_requested|refunded
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_escrow_delivery ON escrows(delivery_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ledger_entries (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  escrow_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES escrows(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  entry_type text NOT NULL, -- release|refund
  dedupe_key text NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_ledger_dedupe ON ledger_entries(escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbox (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid,
  topic text NOT NULL,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  dedupe_key text,
  attempts int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  available_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  locked_at timestamptz,
  locked_by text,
  last_error text,
  dead_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_outbox_dedupe ON outbox(dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_outbox_available ON outbox(available_at) WHERE dead_at IS NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbox_dead_letters (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id uuid,
  topic text NOT NULL,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  error text NOT NULL,
  attempts int NOT NULL,
  moved_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consumer_inbox (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  handler text NOT NULL,
  event_key text NOT NULL,
  processed_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(handler, event_key)
);
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/config.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;

const EnvSchema = z.object({
  NODE_ENV: z.string().default(&quot;development&quot;),
  PORT: z.coerce.number().default(8080),
  DATABASE_URL: z.string(),
  OUTBOX_WORKER_ID: z.string().default(&quot;worker-1&quot;),
  OUTBOX_BATCH: z.coerce.number().default(50),
  OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC: z.coerce.number().default(60),
  OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS: z.coerce.number().default(5),
  STORAGE_BASE_URL: z.string().default(&quot;https://storage.example.com&quot;),
  PRESIGN_TTL_SEC: z.coerce.number().default(600),
  POLICY_MODE: z.string().default(&quot;table&quot;),
});

export type AppConfig = z.infer&lt;typeof EnvSchema&gt;;

export function loadConfig(): AppConfig {
  const env = {
    NODE_ENV: process.env.NODE_ENV,
    PORT: process.env.PORT,
    DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
    OUTBOX_WORKER_ID: process.env.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID,
    OUTBOX_BATCH: process.env.OUTBOX_BATCH,
    OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC: process.env.OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC,
    OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS: process.env.OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS,
    STORAGE_BASE_URL: process.env.STORAGE_BASE_URL,
    PRESIGN_TTL_SEC: process.env.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC,
    POLICY_MODE: process.env.POLICY_MODE,
  };
  return EnvSchema.parse(env);
}

w(&quot;src/db.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import pg from &quot;pg&quot;;
const { Pool } = pg;

export type Db = pg.Pool;

export function createDb(databaseUrl: string): Db {
  return new Pool({ connectionString: databaseUrl, max: 10 });
}

export async function withTx&lt;T&gt;(db: Db, fn: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;): Promise&lt;T&gt; {
  const client = await db.connect();
  try {
    await client.query(&quot;BEGIN&quot;);
    const res = await fn(client);
    await client.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
    return res;
  } catch (e) {
    await client.query(&quot;ROLLBACK&quot;);
    throw e;
  } finally {
    client.release();
  }
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/errors.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
export class AppError extends Error {
  constructor(
    public readonly code: string,
    message: string,
    public readonly status: number = 400,
    public readonly details?: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;
  ) {
    super(message);
  }
}

export function asErrorResponse(err: unknown, traceId?: string) {
  if (err instanceof AppError) {
    return {
      status: err.status,
      body: { error: err.code, message: err.message, details: err.details ?? {}, trace_id: traceId }
    };
  }
  const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : &quot;Unknown error&quot;;
  return { status: 500, body: { error: &quot;INTERNAL&quot;, message, details: {}, trace_id: traceId } };
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/validation.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { ZodSchema } from &quot;zod&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;./errors.js&quot;;

export function parseBody&lt;T&gt;(schema: ZodSchema&lt;T&gt;, body: unknown): T {
  const r = schema.safeParse(body);
  if (!r.success) {
    throw new AppError(&quot;VALIDATION_ERROR&quot;, &quot;Invalid request body&quot;, 400, { issues: r.error.issues });
  }
  return r.data;
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/services/storage.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import crypto from &quot;node:crypto&quot;;

export type PresignPutResult = { url: string; expiresInSec: number; requiredHeaders: Record&lt;string, string&gt; };
export type PresignGetResult = { url: string; expiresInSec: number };

export interface StorageProvider {
  presignPut(key: string, contentType: string, expiresInSec: number, meta?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;): Promise&lt;PresignPutResult&gt;;
  presignGet(key: string, expiresInSec: number): Promise&lt;PresignGetResult&gt;;
}

export class StubStorage implements StorageProvider {
  constructor(private readonly baseUrl: string) {}

  async presignPut(key: string, contentType: string, expiresInSec: number, meta?: Record&lt;string, string&gt;): Promise&lt;PresignPutResult&gt; {
    const token = crypto.createHash(&quot;sha256&quot;).update(`PUT:${key}:${expiresInSec}`).digest(&quot;hex&quot;).slice(0, 32);
    const url = `${this.baseUrl}/put/${encodeURIComponent(key)}?token=${token}&amp;exp=${expiresInSec}`;
    const requiredHeaders: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = { &quot;Content-Type&quot;: contentType };
    if (meta) for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(meta)) requiredHeaders[k] = v;
    return { url, expiresInSec, requiredHeaders };
  }

  async presignGet(key: string, expiresInSec: number): Promise&lt;PresignGetResult&gt; {
    const token = crypto.createHash(&quot;sha256&quot;).update(`GET:${key}:${expiresInSec}`).digest(&quot;hex&quot;).slice(0, 32);
    const url = `${this.baseUrl}/get/${encodeURIComponent(key)}?token=${token}&amp;exp=${expiresInSec}`;
    return { url, expiresInSec };
  }
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/services/policy.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
export type PolicyInput = {
  tenant_id: string;
  data_class: &quot;D0&quot;|&quot;D1&quot;|&quot;D2&quot;|&quot;D3&quot;;
  level: &quot;L0&quot;|&quot;L1&quot;|&quot;L2&quot;;
  file: { kind: string; size_bytes: number; declared_mime: string; sha256?: string|null };
  signals: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;
};

export type PolicyDecision = {
  allow: boolean;
  action: &quot;deny&quot;|&quot;scan_only&quot;|&quot;extract_text&quot;|&quot;allow&quot;;
  review: { required: boolean; reason: string|null };
  limits: { max_wall_time_ms?: number; max_depth?: number; max_uncompressed_bytes?: number };
  failure_code?: string|null;
};

export function decide(input: PolicyInput): PolicyDecision {
  if (input.file.size_bytes &gt; 500_000_000) {
    return { allow: false, action: &quot;deny&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: {}, failure_code: &quot;FILE_TOO_LARGE&quot; };
  }
  if (input.file.kind === &quot;zip&quot; &amp;&amp; input.data_class === &quot;D0&quot;) {
    return { allow: false, action: &quot;deny&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: {}, failure_code: &quot;ZIP_BLOCKED_FOR_D0&quot; };
  }
  const pdfJs = Boolean((input.signals as any).pdf_js);
  if (input.file.kind === &quot;pdf&quot; &amp;&amp; pdfJs &amp;&amp; input.data_class !== &quot;D0&quot;) {
    return { allow: true, action: &quot;scan_only&quot;, review: { required: true, reason: &quot;PDF_SUSPICIOUS_ACTIVE_CONTENT&quot; }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 5000 } };
  }
  if (input.data_class === &quot;D2&quot; &amp;&amp; input.level === &quot;L1&quot;) {
    return { allow: true, action: &quot;extract_text&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 10000, max_depth: 1, max_uncompressed_bytes: 200_000_000 } };
  }
  return { allow: true, action: &quot;scan_only&quot;, review: { required: false, reason: null }, limits: { max_wall_time_ms: 7000, max_depth: 1 } };
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/services/outbox.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import type pg from &quot;pg&quot;;

export async function outboxInsert(
  client: pg.PoolClient,
  topic: string,
  payload: unknown,
  tenantId?: string|null,
  dedupeKey?: string|null,
  availableAt?: Date
) {
  await client.query(
    `INSERT INTO outbox (tenant_id, topic, payload, dedupe_key, available_at)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4, COALESCE($5, now()))
     ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
    [tenantId ?? null, topic, JSON.stringify(payload), dedupeKey ?? null, availableAt ?? null]
  );
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/routes/deliveries.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

const CreateDeliverySchema = z.object({
  title: z.string().optional(),
  data_class: z.enum([&quot;D0&quot;,&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;D3&quot;]).default(&quot;D1&quot;),
  level: z.enum([&quot;L0&quot;,&quot;L1&quot;,&quot;L2&quot;]).default(&quot;L0&quot;)
});

export async function deliveriesRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const body = parseBody(CreateDeliverySchema, req.body);
    const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const d = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO deliveries (tenant_id, title, data_class, level)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
         RETURNING *`,
        [tenantId, body.title ?? null, body.data_class, body.level]
      );
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO tenant_quotas (tenant_id) VALUES ($1)
         ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO NOTHING`,
        [tenantId]
      );
      return d.rows[0];
    });

    reply.code(201).send({ delivery: res });
  });

  app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
      [tenantId, deliveryId]
    );
    if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
    reply.send({ delivery: r.rows[0] });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/submit&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
    const shaHeader = req.headers[&quot;x-file-sha256&quot;] as string | undefined;

    const updated = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const d = await c.query(
        `SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );
      if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);

      const a = await c.query(
        `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );
      if (a.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NO_ARTIFACTS&quot;, &quot;No artifacts in delivery&quot;, 409);

      if (shaHeader &amp;&amp; a.rowCount === 1 &amp;&amp; !a.rows[0].sha256_quarantine) {
        await c.query(
          `UPDATE artifacts SET sha256_quarantine=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2 AND tenant_id=$3`,
          [shaHeader, a.rows[0].id, tenantId]
        );
        a.rows[0].sha256_quarantine = shaHeader;
      }

      const missing = a.rows.filter(x =&gt; !x.sha256_quarantine);
      if (missing.length) {
        throw new AppError(
          &quot;MISSING_SHA256&quot;,
          &quot;sha256_quarantine required for all artifacts (use upload meta or X-File-Sha256 for single artifact)&quot;,
          409,
          { missing_artifact_ids: missing.map(m =&gt; m.id) }
        );
      }

      for (const art of a.rows) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scan_in_progress&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [art.id, tenantId]);
        const dedupe = `scan:${tenantId}:${deliveryId}:${art.id}:${art.sha256_quarantine}`;
        await outboxInsert(c, &quot;scan.artifact_requested.v1&quot;, {
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          delivery_id: deliveryId,
          artifact_id: art.id,
          sha256_quarantine: art.sha256_quarantine,
          declared_mime: art.declared_mime,
          size_bytes: Number(art.size_bytes),
          filename: art.filename,
          data_class: d.rows[0].data_class,
          level: d.rows[0].level
        }, tenantId, dedupe);
      }

      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO escrows (tenant_id, delivery_id, amount_cents, currency)
         VALUES ($1, $2, 0, &#x27;EUR&#x27;)
         ON CONFLICT (delivery_id) DO NOTHING`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId]
      );

      const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
      return out.rows[0];
    });

    reply.code(202).send({ delivery: updated });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/accept&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

    const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
      if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
      if (d.rows[0].status !== &quot;verified_pass&quot; &amp;&amp; d.rows[0].status !== &quot;accepted&quot;) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Delivery must be verified_pass to accept&quot;, 409, { status: d.rows[0].status });
      }

      const e = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM escrows WHERE delivery_id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [deliveryId]);
      if (e.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;ESCROW_MISSING&quot;, &quot;Escrow missing&quot;, 409);

      const dedupe = `release:${deliveryId}`;
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO ledger_entries (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key)
         VALUES ($1, &#x27;release&#x27;, $2)
         ON CONFLICT (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
        [e.rows[0].id, dedupe]
      );

      await c.query(`UPDATE escrows SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1`, [e.rows[0].id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;accepted&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

      const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
      return out.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ delivery: res });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/reject&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

    const res = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
      if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
      if (d.rows[0].status === &quot;accepted&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Cannot reject accepted delivery&quot;, 409);

      const e = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM escrows WHERE delivery_id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [deliveryId]);
      if (e.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;ESCROW_MISSING&quot;, &quot;Escrow missing&quot;, 409);

      const dedupe = `refund:${deliveryId}`;
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO ledger_entries (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key)
         VALUES ($1, &#x27;refund&#x27;, $2)
         ON CONFLICT (escrow_id, entry_type, dedupe_key) DO NOTHING`,
        [e.rows[0].id, dedupe]
      );

      await c.query(`UPDATE escrows SET status=&#x27;refunded&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1`, [e.rows[0].id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;rejected&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);

      const out = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2`, [deliveryId, tenantId]);
      return out.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ delivery: res });
  });
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/routes/artifacts.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
import crypto from &quot;node:crypto&quot;;
import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;

const CreateArtifactSchema = z.object({
  filename: z.string().min(1),
  size_bytes: z.number().int().positive(),
  declared_mime: z.string().min(1)
});

function guessKind(filename: string, mime: string): string {
  const f = filename.toLowerCase();
  if (mime.includes(&quot;pdf&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) return &quot;pdf&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;zip&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.zip&quot;)) return &quot;zip&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;word&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.docx&quot;)) return &quot;docx&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;text&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.txt&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.md&quot;)) return &quot;text&quot;;
  return &quot;unknown&quot;;
}

export async function artifactsRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  app.post(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;
    const body = parseBody(CreateArtifactSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const d = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM deliveries WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, deliveryId]);
      if (d.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Delivery not found&quot;, 404);
      if (d.rows[0].status !== &quot;submitted&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Delivery not in submitted state&quot;, 409, { status: d.rows[0].status });

      const kind = guessKind(body.filename, body.declared_mime);
      const key = `quarantine/${tenantId}/${deliveryId}/${crypto.randomBytes(8).toString(&quot;hex&quot;)}_${sanitize(body.filename)}`;

      const r = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO artifacts (tenant_id, delivery_id, filename, size_bytes, declared_mime, kind, quarantine_key)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7)
         RETURNING *`,
        [tenantId, deliveryId, body.filename, body.size_bytes, body.declared_mime, kind, key]
      );

      const presign = await app.storage.presignPut(key, body.declared_mime, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC, {
        &quot;x-amz-meta-sha256&quot;: &quot;&lt;client_sha256_here&gt;&quot;
      });

      return { artifact: r.rows[0], presign };
    });

    reply.code(201).send({
      artifact: out.artifact,
      upload_url: out.presign.url,
      expires_in_sec: out.presign.expiresInSec,
      required_headers: out.presign.requiredHeaders
    });
  });

  app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
    const deliveryId = (req.params as any).delivery_id as string;

    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at`,
      [tenantId, deliveryId]
    );
    reply.send({ artifacts: r.rows });
  });

  app.get(&quot;/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts/:artifact_id/download&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const { delivery_id, artifact_id } = req.params as any;

    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND id=$3 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
      [tenantId, delivery_id, artifact_id]
    );
    if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Artifact not found&quot;, 404);
    const art = r.rows[0];
    if (art.status !== &quot;released&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Artifact not released&quot;, 403, { status: art.status });

    const presign = await app.storage.presignGet(art.released_key ?? art.quarantine_key, app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC);
    reply.send({
      url: presign.url,
      expires_in_sec: presign.expiresInSec,
      sha256: art.sha256_released ?? art.sha256_quarantine,
      size_bytes: Number(art.size_bytes),
      filename: art.filename
    });
  });
}

function sanitize(name: string) {
  return name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/g, &quot;_&quot;).slice(0, 120);
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/routes/review.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

const ResolveSchema = z.object({
  resolution: z.enum([&quot;approve&quot;,&quot;reject&quot;,&quot;request_redaction&quot;]),
  note: z.string().optional()
});

export async function reviewRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  app.get(&quot;/v1/review/cases&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200`,
      [tenantId]
    );
    reply.send({ cases: r.rows });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/review/cases/:case_id/claim&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    const actorId = req.headers[&quot;x-actor-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
    if (!actorId) throw new AppError(&quot;ACTOR_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Actor-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const caseId = (req.params as any).case_id as string;

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const r = await c.query(
        `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`,
        [tenantId, caseId]
      );
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Case not found&quot;, 404);
      if (r.rows[0].status !== &quot;pending&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Case not pending&quot;, 409, { status: r.rows[0].status });

      await c.query(
        `UPDATE review_cases SET status=&#x27;in_progress&#x27;, assigned_to=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`,
        [actorId, caseId]
      );
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO review_actions (case_id, actor_id, action, note) VALUES ($1,$2,&#x27;assign&#x27;,$3)`,
        [caseId, actorId, null]
      );
      const out2 = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE id=$1`, [caseId]);
      return out2.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ case: out });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/review/cases/:case_id/resolve&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = req.headers[&quot;x-tenant-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    const actorId = req.headers[&quot;x-actor-id&quot;] as string | undefined;
    if (!tenantId) throw new AppError(&quot;TENANT_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Tenant-Id header&quot;, 401);
    if (!actorId) throw new AppError(&quot;ACTOR_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Missing X-Actor-Id header&quot;, 401);

    const caseId = (req.params as any).case_id as string;
    const body = parseBody(ResolveSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const r = await c.query(
        `SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`,
        [tenantId, caseId]
      );
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Case not found&quot;, 404);
      if (![&quot;in_progress&quot;,&quot;pending&quot;].includes(r.rows[0].status)) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Case not resolvable&quot;, 409, { status: r.rows[0].status });
      }

      const newStatus = body.resolution === &quot;approve&quot; ? &quot;approved&quot; : (body.resolution === &quot;reject&quot; ? &quot;rejected&quot; : &quot;redacted&quot;);
      await c.query(`UPDATE review_cases SET status=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`, [newStatus, caseId]);
      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO review_actions (case_id, actor_id, action, note) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4)`,
        [caseId, actorId, body.resolution, body.note ?? null]
      );

      await outboxInsert(c, &quot;review.case_resolved.v1&quot;, {
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        case_id: caseId,
        resolution: body.resolution
      }, tenantId, `review_resolve:${tenantId}:${caseId}:${body.resolution}`);

      const out2 = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE id=$1`, [caseId]);
      return out2.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ case: out });
  });
}

w(&quot;src/routes/admin.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import { z } from &quot;zod&quot;;
import { parseBody } from &quot;../validation.js&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

const QuotaSchema = z.object({
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  scans_per_min: z.number().int().positive(),
  bytes_per_day: z.number().int().positive(),
  max_inflight_scans: z.number().int().positive()
});

export async function adminRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  function requireAdmin(req: any) {
    if ((req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase() !== &quot;true&quot;) {
      throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin only&quot;, 403);
    }
  }

  app.put(&quot;/v1/admin/tenants/:tenant_id/quotas&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    requireAdmin(req);
    const tenantIdParam = (req.params as any).tenant_id as string;
    const body = parseBody(QuotaSchema, req.body);
    if (tenantIdParam !== body.tenant_id) throw new AppError(&quot;VALIDATION_ERROR&quot;, &quot;tenant_id mismatch&quot;, 400);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const t = await c.query(`SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [body.tenant_id]);
      if (t.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Tenant not found&quot;, 404);

      const q = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO tenant_quotas (tenant_id, scans_per_min, bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans, updated_at)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,now())
         ON CONFLICT (tenant_id)
         DO UPDATE SET scans_per_min=EXCLUDED.scans_per_min, bytes_per_day=EXCLUDED.bytes_per_day, max_inflight_scans=EXCLUDED.max_inflight_scans, updated_at=now()
         RETURNING *`,
        [body.tenant_id, body.scans_per_min, body.bytes_per_day, body.max_inflight_scans]
      );
      return q.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ quota: out });
  });

  app.get(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    requireAdmin(req);
    const r = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters ORDER BY moved_at DESC LIMIT 200`);
    reply.send({ items: r.rows });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/admin/dlq/:id/replay&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    requireAdmin(req);
    const id = (req.params as any).id as string;

    await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const r = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [id]);
      if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;DLQ item not found&quot;, 404);

      const item = r.rows[0];
      await outboxInsert(c, item.topic, item.payload, item.tenant_id, `dlq_replay:${id}:${Date.now()}`);
      await c.query(`DELETE FROM outbox_dead_letters WHERE id=$1`, [id]);
    });

    reply.code(202).send({ replayed: true });
  });
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

w(&quot;src/routes/dsar.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { FastifyInstance } from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
import { outboxInsert } from &quot;../services/outbox.js&quot;;

export async function dsarRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  function requireAdmin(req: any) {
    if ((req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase() !== &quot;true&quot;) {
      throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin only&quot;, 403);
    }
  }

  app.post(&quot;/v1/dsar/subjects/:subject_id/export&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    requireAdmin(req);
    const subjectId = (req.params as any).subject_id as string;

    await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      await outboxInsert(c, &quot;dsar.export_requested.v1&quot;, { subject_id: subjectId }, null, `dsar_export:${subjectId}:${Date.now()}`);
    });

    reply.code(202).send({
      subject_id: subjectId,
      export_url: `${app.config.STORAGE_BASE_URL}/exports/${encodeURIComponent(subjectId)}.json`,
      expires_in_sec: app.config.PRESIGN_TTL_SEC
    });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/dsar/subjects/:subject_id/erase&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    requireAdmin(req);
    const subjectId = (req.params as any).subject_id as string;

    await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      await outboxInsert(c, &quot;dsar.erase_requested.v1&quot;, { subject_id: subjectId }, null, `dsar_erase:${subjectId}:${Date.now()}`);
    });

    reply.code(202).send({ queued: true });
  });
}

w(&quot;src/app.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import Fastify from &quot;fastify&quot;;
import cors from &quot;@fastify/cors&quot;;
import helmet from &quot;@fastify/helmet&quot;;
import requestContext from &quot;@fastify/request-context&quot;;
import { loadConfig } from &quot;./config.js&quot;;
import { createDb } from &quot;./db.js&quot;;
import { asErrorResponse } from &quot;./errors.js&quot;;
import { StubStorage } from &quot;./services/storage.js&quot;;
import { deliveriesRoutes } from &quot;./routes/deliveries.js&quot;;
import { artifactsRoutes } from &quot;./routes/artifacts.js&quot;;
import { reviewRoutes } from &quot;./routes/review.js&quot;;
import { adminRoutes } from &quot;./routes/admin.js&quot;;
import { dsarRoutes } from &quot;./routes/dsar.js&quot;;

export function buildApp() {
  const config = loadConfig();
  const app = Fastify({ logger: true });

  app.decorate(&quot;config&quot;, config);
  app.decorate(&quot;db&quot;, createDb(config.DATABASE_URL));
  app.decorate(&quot;storage&quot;, new StubStorage(config.STORAGE_BASE_URL));

  app.register(requestContext, { hook: &quot;onRequest&quot; });
  app.register(cors, { origin: true });
  app.register(helmet);

  app.setErrorHandler((err, req, reply) =&gt; {
    const traceId = (req.headers[&quot;x-request-id&quot;] as string) ?? undefined;
    const r = asErrorResponse(err, traceId);
    reply.code(r.status).send(r.body);
  });

  app.get(&quot;/healthz&quot;, async () =&gt; ({ ok: true }));

  app.register(deliveriesRoutes);
  app.register(artifactsRoutes);
  app.register(reviewRoutes);
  app.register(adminRoutes);
  app.register(dsarRoutes);

  return app;
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

import { buildApp } from &quot;./app.js&quot;;

const app = buildApp();
const port = app.config.PORT;

app.listen({ port, host: &quot;0.0.0.0&quot; })
  .then(() =&gt; app.log.info({ port }, &quot;API listening&quot;))
  .catch((e) =&gt; {
    app.log.error(e);
    process.exit(1);
  });

w(&quot;src/scripts/migrate.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import fs from &quot;node:fs&quot;;
import path from &quot;node:path&quot;;
import { fileURLToPath } from &quot;node:url&quot;;
import { loadConfig } from &quot;../config.js&quot;;
import { createDb } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

async function main() {
  const config = loadConfig();
  const db = createDb(config.DATABASE_URL);
  const migrationsDir = path.resolve(__dirname, &quot;../../migrations&quot;);
  const files = fs.readdirSync(migrationsDir).filter(f =&gt; f.endsWith(&quot;.sql&quot;)).sort();

  for (const f of files) {
    const sql = fs.readFileSync(path.join(migrationsDir, f), &quot;utf-8&quot;);
    console.log(&quot;Applying&quot;, f);
    await db.query(sql);
  }
  await db.end();
  console.log(&quot;Done.&quot;);
}

main().catch((e) =&gt; { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });

w(&quot;src/workers/outbox_dispatcher.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { loadConfig } from &quot;../config.js&quot;;
import { createDb, withTx } from &quot;../db.js&quot;;
import { decide } from &quot;../services/policy.js&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;

type OutboxRow = {
  id: string;
  tenant_id: string | null;
  topic: string;
  payload: any;
  attempts: number;
};

function sleep(ms: number) {
  return new Promise((r) =&gt; setTimeout(r, ms));
}

function classifyError(e: unknown): &quot;TRANSIENT&quot;|&quot;PERMANENT&quot; {
  if (e instanceof AppError) return &quot;PERMANENT&quot;;
  return &quot;TRANSIENT&quot;;
}

function backoffMs(attempt: number) {
  const base = 2000;
  const max = 5 * 60 * 1000;
  const exp = Math.min(max, base * Math.pow(2, attempt));
  const jitter = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000);
  return exp + jitter;
}

function guessKind(filename: string, mime: string) {
  const f = filename.toLowerCase();
  if (mime.includes(&quot;pdf&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) return &quot;pdf&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;zip&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.zip&quot;)) return &quot;zip&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;word&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.docx&quot;)) return &quot;docx&quot;;
  if (mime.includes(&quot;text&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.txt&quot;) || f.endsWith(&quot;.md&quot;)) return &quot;text&quot;;
  return &quot;unknown&quot;;
}

async function handleScanArtifact(db: any, row: OutboxRow) {
  const p = row.payload as any;
  const filename = (p.filename ?? &quot;&quot;).toString().toLowerCase();
  const signals: any = {};
  if (filename.includes(&quot;js&quot;) &amp;&amp; filename.endsWith(&quot;.pdf&quot;)) signals.pdf_js = true;

  const policy = decide({
    tenant_id: p.tenant_id,
    data_class: p.data_class,
    level: p.level,
    file: { kind: guessKind(filename, p.declared_mime), size_bytes: p.size_bytes, declared_mime: p.declared_mime, sha256: p.sha256_quarantine },
    signals
  });

  const verdict = !policy.allow ? &quot;fail&quot; : (policy.review.required ? &quot;pending_review&quot; : &quot;pass&quot;);
  const failure_code = policy.allow ? null : (policy.failure_code ?? &quot;POLICY_DENY&quot;);
  const risk_score = policy.review.required ? 60 : 10;

  await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
    await c.query(
      `INSERT INTO verification_reports (tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, verdict, failure_code, risk_score, signals)
       VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7::jsonb)`,
      [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id, p.artifact_id, verdict, failure_code, risk_score, JSON.stringify(signals)]
    );

    if (verdict === &quot;fail&quot;) {
      await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scanned_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);
      return;
    }

    if (verdict === &quot;pending_review&quot;) {
      await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;released_pending_review&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verification_pending_review&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);

      await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO review_cases (tenant_id, delivery_id, artifact_id, status, reason_code, risk_score)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,&#x27;pending&#x27;,$4,$5)`,
        [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id, p.artifact_id, policy.review.reason ?? &quot;REVIEW_REQUIRED&quot;, risk_score]
      );
      return;
    }

    // pass -&gt; release (MVP: released_key = quarantine_key)
    await c.query(
      `UPDATE artifacts
       SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, sha256_released=sha256_quarantine, released_key=quarantine_key, updated_at=now()
       WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`,
      [p.tenant_id, p.artifact_id]
    );

    const cnt = await c.query(
      `SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total,
              SUM(CASE WHEN status=&#x27;released&#x27; THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS released
       FROM artifacts
       WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND delivery_id=$2 AND deleted_at IS NULL`,
      [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]
    );
    if (cnt.rows[0].total === cnt.rows[0].released) {
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_pass&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, p.delivery_id]);
    }
  });
}

async function handleReviewResolved(db: any, row: OutboxRow) {
  const p = row.payload as any;
  await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
    const rc = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM review_cases WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2 FOR UPDATE`, [p.tenant_id, p.case_id]);
    if (rc.rowCount === 0) return;

    const caseRow = rc.rows[0];
    if (p.resolution === &quot;approve&quot;) {
      await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;released&#x27;, sha256_released=sha256_quarantine, released_key=quarantine_key, updated_at=now()
                     WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.artifact_id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_pass&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.delivery_id]);
    } else if (p.resolution === &quot;reject&quot;) {
      await c.query(`UPDATE artifacts SET status=&#x27;scanned_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.artifact_id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE deliveries SET status=&#x27;verified_fail&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2`, [p.tenant_id, caseRow.delivery_id]);
    } else {
      // request_redaction -&gt; в проде запускается redaction pipeline; тут no-op
    }
  });
}

async function moveToDlq(db: any, row: OutboxRow, e: unknown) {
  const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : &quot;error&quot;;
  await db.query(
    `INSERT INTO outbox_dead_letters (id, tenant_id, topic, payload, error, attempts)
     VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4::jsonb,$5,$6)
     ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING`,
    [row.id, row.tenant_id, row.topic, JSON.stringify(row.payload), msg, row.attempts]
  );
}

async function main() {
  const config = loadConfig();
  const db = createDb(config.DATABASE_URL);
  console.log(&quot;outbox worker starting&quot;, { id: config.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID });

  while (true) {
    const rows: OutboxRow[] = await withTx(db, async (c: any) =&gt; {
      const r = await c.query(
        `SELECT id, tenant_id, topic, payload, attempts
         FROM outbox
         WHERE dead_at IS NULL
           AND available_at &lt;= now()
           AND (locked_at IS NULL OR locked_at &lt; now() - ($1 || &#x27; seconds&#x27;)::interval)
         ORDER BY created_at
         FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
         LIMIT $2`,
        [config.OUTBOX_LOCK_TTL_SEC, config.OUTBOX_BATCH]
      );
      for (const row of r.rows) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE outbox SET locked_at=now(), locked_by=$1 WHERE id=$2`, [config.OUTBOX_WORKER_ID, row.id]);
      }
      return r.rows;
    });

    if (!rows.length) {
      await sleep(250);
      continue;
    }

    for (const row of rows) {
      try {
        if (row.topic === &quot;scan.artifact_requested.v1&quot;) {
          await handleScanArtifact(db, row);
        } else if (row.topic === &quot;review.case_resolved.v1&quot;) {
          await handleReviewResolved(db, row);
        } else {
          throw new Error(`Unknown topic: ${row.topic}`);
        }
        await db.query(`DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id=$1`, [row.id]);
      } catch (e) {
        const kind = classifyError(e);
        const attempts = row.attempts + 1;

        if (kind === &quot;PERMANENT&quot; || attempts &gt;= config.OUTBOX_MAX_ATTEMPTS) {
          await moveToDlq(db, { ...row, attempts }, e);
          await db.query(`DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id=$1`, [row.id]);
        } else {
          const delay = backoffMs(attempts);
          await db.query(
            `UPDATE outbox
             SET attempts=$2, last_error=$3, available_at=now() + ($4 || &#x27; milliseconds&#x27;)::interval,
                 locked_at=NULL, locked_by=NULL
             WHERE id=$1`,
            [row.id, attempts, (e instanceof Error ? e.message : &quot;error&quot;), delay]
          );
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

main().catch((e) =&gt; { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

  }

# zip

if zip_path.exists():
    zip_path.unlink()

        if p.is_file():

zip_path

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Сделаю продолжение в виде **готового каркаса проекта** (API + БД + outbox-воркер) — чтобы можно было сразу запускать и дальше наращивать сканеры/редакцию/эскроу.

[Скачать проект delivery-verification-skeleton.zip](sandbox:/mnt/data/delivery-verification-skeleton.zip)

### Что внутри (коротко)
- **TypeScript + Fastify + Postgres**
- Роуты:
  - `/v1/deliveries` (создать, получить, submit, accept/reject)
  - `/v1/deliveries/:delivery_id/artifacts` (создать артефакт → presigned PUT, список, download)
  - `/v1/review/cases` (лист, claim, resolve)
  - `/v1/admin/tenants/:id/quotas`, `/v1/admin/dlq`, `/v1/admin/dlq/:id/replay`
  - `/v1/dsar/...` (export/erase queued через outbox)
- **Outbox** + **retries** + **DLQ**
- Заглушки: storage (presigned URL) + policy engine (простая функция `decide()`)

### Как запустить
1) Распаковать zip  
2) `cp .env.example .env`  
3) `docker compose up -d db`  
4) `npm i`  
5) `npm run dev` (API на `:8080`)  
6) Миграции:
   - `npm run build`
   - `npm run migrate`
7) Воркер outbox:
   - `npm run worker:outbox`

### Важно про sha256_quarantine
Так как загрузка идёт по presigned PUT, сервер **не видит файл**. В каркасе предусмотрено:
- либо передавать sha256 как метаданные upload (в `required_headers` есть пример `x-amz-meta-sha256`)
- либо (MVP) прислать `X-File-Sha256` в `POST /v1/deliveries/{id}/submit` **только если 1 файл и sha ещё пустой**.

Если хочешь — следующим шагом я добавлю:
- полноценную **идемпотентность на все критичные ручки** (Idempotency-Key + таблица request_log),
- нормальный **quota/rate limit** (token bucket в Redis/PG),
- более близкую к реальности **storage-верификацию** (S3 checksum / callback / inventory).

--- ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЬ ---
Продолжение

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Ок — продолжу как в «инженерном проекте»: (1) усиливаю каркас кодом (идемпотентность, квоты, commit после upload), (2) даю следующий пошаговый план для рынка «аренды простаивающих агентов».

from pathlib import Path
import textwrap, json, zipfile, shutil, hashlib, datetime

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)

# Prepare v0.4 folder
proj = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.4&quot;
if proj.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(proj)
proj.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def w(rel, content):
    p = proj / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)
