  /**
   * Marketplace policies (admin-only in MVP)
   */
  app.get(&quot;/v1/marketplace/policies&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);

    reply.send({ policy });

  app.put(&quot;/v1/marketplace/policies&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const body = parseBody(PolicyPatchSchema, req.body);
    const policy = await upsertGlobalPolicy(app.db as any, body as any);
    reply.send({ policy });

&quot;&quot;&quot;)

    inject = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
    const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(app.db as any);

    // Anti &quot;calculator&quot; / low-value guardrails:
    const complexity = computeComplexityScore(body.description, body.deliverables, body.category);

    if (body.is_pro_bono) {
      if (body.budget_cents !== 0) throw new AppError(&quot;PRO_BONO_BUDGET_MUST_BE_ZERO&quot;, &quot;Pro bono jobs must have budget_cents=0&quot;, 400);
    } else {
      const minBudget = Number((policy.min_budget_cents as any)[body.category] ?? 0);
      if (minBudget &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; body.budget_cents &lt; minBudget) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;BUDGET_TOO_LOW&quot;, &quot;Budget is below minimum for category&quot;, 400, { min_budget_cents: minBudget, category: body.category });
      }
    }

    if (body.description.trim().length &lt; policy.min_description_len) {
      throw new AppError(&quot;DESCRIPTION_TOO_SHORT&quot;, &quot;Job description too short&quot;, 400, { min_len: policy.min_description_len });
    }

    if (policy.require_deliverables &amp;&amp; (!body.deliverables || body.deliverables.length === 0)) {
      throw new AppError(&quot;DELIVERABLES_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Deliverables list required&quot;, 400);
    }

    // Daily low-complexity limiter (requester)
    if (!body.is_pro_bono &amp;&amp; isLowComplexity(complexity) &amp;&amp; policy.low_complexity_daily_limit &gt; 0) {
      // increment within tx below
    }
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market.replace(
        &quot;    const tenantId = tenantIdFrom(req);\n    const body = parseBody(CreateJobSchema, req.body);\n&quot;,
        &quot;    const tenantId = tenantIdFrom(req);\n    const body = parseBody(CreateJobSchema, req.body);\n&quot; + inject + &quot;\n&quot;
    )

# Now patch inside tx to update tenant_low_complexity_day and insert complexity/deliverables/is_pro_bono
# Insert logic before inserting job row.
# Replace job insert query to include new columns.
market = market.replace(
    &quot;`INSERT INTO jobs (tenant_id, title, description, category, budget_cents, currency)\n         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6)\n         RETURNING *`&quot;,
    &quot;`INSERT INTO jobs (tenant_id, title, description, category, budget_cents, currency, deliverables, is_pro_bono, complexity_score)\n         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7::jsonb,$8,$9)\n         RETURNING *`&quot;
)
market = market.replace(
    &quot;[tenantId, body.title, body.description, body.category, body.budget_cents, body.currency]&quot;,
    &quot;[tenantId, body.title, body.description, body.category, body.budget_cents, body.currency, JSON.stringify(body.deliverables ?? []), body.is_pro_bono, complexity]&quot;
)

# Add low complexity daily count increment logic inside tx, before job insert.
# We&#x27;ll insert after tenants upsert line in tx.
tx_anchor = &quot;      await c.query(`INSERT INTO tenants (id, name) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING`, [\n        tenantId,\n        `tenant-${tenantId.slice(0, 8)}`,\n      ]);&quot;
if tx_anchor in market and &quot;tenant_low_complexity_day&quot; not in market[market.find(tx_anchor):market.find(tx_anchor)+600]:
    market = market.replace(
        tx_anchor,
        tx_anchor + &quot;\n\n      // Low complexity daily limiter (only for non-pro-bono jobs)\n      if (!body.is_pro_bono &amp;&amp; isLowComplexity(complexity)) {\n        const today = (new Date()).toISOString().slice(0,10);\n        const cur = await c.query(`SELECT count FROM tenant_low_complexity_day WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND day=$2 FOR UPDATE`, [tenantId, today]);\n        const count = cur.rowCount ? Number(cur.rows[0].count) : 0;\n        if (policy.low_complexity_daily_limit &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; count &gt;= policy.low_complexity_daily_limit) {\n          throw new AppError(\&quot;LOW_COMPLEXITY_LIMIT\&quot;, \&quot;Daily low-complexity job limit exceeded\&quot;, 429, { limit: policy.low_complexity_daily_limit });\n        }\n        await c.query(\n          `INSERT INTO tenant_low_complexity_day (tenant_id, day, count) VALUES ($1,$2,1)\n           ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, day) DO UPDATE SET count=tenant_low_complexity_day.count+1`,\n          [tenantId, today]\n        );\n      }\n&quot;
    )

# 8) Enforce pro bono offer pricing: if job is pro bono =&gt; price must be 0; else &gt;0
offer_handler_key = &quot;app.post(\&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/offers\&quot;&quot;
offer_pos = market.find(offer_handler_key)
if offer_pos != -1 and &quot;PRO_BONO_OFFER_PRICE&quot; not in market[offer_pos:offer_pos+1200]:
    # In tx offer handler we already SELECT job. We&#x27;ll insert validation after job status check.
    insert_after = &quot;      if (job.rows[0].status !== \&quot;open\&quot;) throw new AppError(\&quot;INVALID_STATE\&quot;, \&quot;Job not open\&quot;, 409, { status: job.rows[0].status });\n&quot;
    market = market.replace(
        insert_after,
        insert_after + &quot;\n      // Pro bono: enforce zero-price offers; otherwise require positive price\n      const isProBono = Boolean(job.rows[0].is_pro_bono);\n      if (isProBono) {\n        if (body.price_cents !== 0) throw new AppError(\&quot;PRO_BONO_OFFER_PRICE\&quot;, \&quot;Pro bono jobs require price_cents=0\&quot;, 400);\n      } else {\n        if (body.price_cents &lt;= 0) throw new AppError(\&quot;PRICE_REQUIRED\&quot;, \&quot;Non-pro-bono offers must have price_cents&gt;0\&quot;, 400);\n      }\n&quot;
    )

# 9) Enforce acceptance criteria at accept-offer (non-empty if policy requires)
accept_pos = market.find(&quot;app.post(\&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/accept-offer\&quot;&quot;)
if accept_pos != -1 and &quot;REQUIRE_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA&quot; not in market[accept_pos:accept_pos+1500]:
    # insert policy fetch and check after parseBody
    market = market.replace(
        &quot;    const body = parseBody(AcceptOfferSchema, req.body);\n\n    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {&quot;,
        &quot;    const body = parseBody(AcceptOfferSchema, req.body);\n    const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(app.db as any);\n    if (policy.require_acceptance_criteria &amp;&amp; (!body.acceptance_criteria || Object.keys(body.acceptance_criteria).length === 0)) {\n      throw new AppError(\&quot;ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA_REQUIRED\&quot;, \&quot;Acceptance criteria required to accept offer\&quot;, 400);\n    }\n\n    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {&quot;
    )

# 10) Add agent presence endpoints + suggest agents for job
presence_routes = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  /**
   * Agent presence / availability (provider)
   */
  app.post(&quot;/v1/agents/:agent_id/presence&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const providerTenantId = tenantIdFrom(req);
    const agentId = (req.params as any).agent_id as string;
    const body = parseBody(PresenceSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const a = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM agents WHERE id=$1 AND provider_tenant_id=$2`, [agentId, providerTenantId]);
      if (a.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Agent not found for provider&quot;, 404);

      const now = new Date().toISOString();
      const idleSince = body.status === &quot;idle&quot; ? now : null;

      const r = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO agent_presence (agent_id, status, categories, max_hours, idle_since, busy_until, updated_at)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3::jsonb,$4,$5,$6,now())
         ON CONFLICT (agent_id)
         DO UPDATE SET status=EXCLUDED.status,
                      categories=EXCLUDED.categories,
                      max_hours=EXCLUDED.max_hours,
                      idle_since=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.idle_since, agent_presence.idle_since),
                      busy_until=EXCLUDED.busy_until,
                      updated_at=now()
         RETURNING *`,
        [agentId, body.status, JSON.stringify(body.categories ?? []), body.max_hours, idleSince, body.busy_until ?? null]
      );
      return r.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ presence: out });
  });

  app.get(&quot;/v1/agents/idle&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    tenantIdFrom(req); // any authenticated tenant can browse in MVP
    const category = (req.query as any)?.category as string | undefined;

    const args: any[] = [];
    const where: string[] = [&quot;p.status=&#x27;idle&#x27;&quot;];
    if (category) {
      args.push(category);
      where.push(`p.categories ? $${args.length}`);
    }

    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT a.*, p.status, p.categories, p.max_hours, p.idle_since
       FROM agents a
       JOIN agent_presence p ON p.agent_id=a.id
       WHERE ${where.join(&quot; AND &quot;)}
       ORDER BY p.idle_since ASC NULLS LAST
       LIMIT 200`,
      args
    );

    reply.send({ agents: r.rows });
  });

  /**
   * Job -&gt; suggest idle agents (capability match)
   */
  app.get(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/suggest-agents&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    tenantIdFrom(req);
    const jobId = (req.params as any).job_id as string;

    const j = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id=$1`, [jobId]);
    if (j.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Job not found&quot;, 404);

    const category = String(j.rows[0].category);

    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT a.*, p.status, p.categories, p.idle_since
       FROM agents a
       JOIN agent_presence p ON p.agent_id=a.id
       WHERE p.status=&#x27;idle&#x27; AND (p.categories ? $1 OR $1=&#x27;general&#x27;)
       ORDER BY p.idle_since ASC NULLS LAST
       LIMIT 100`,
      [category]
    );

    reply.send({ job: j.rows[0], suggested_agents: r.rows });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)

# Insert presence_routes near after provider/agents listing maybe after GET /v1/providers/me/agents
if &quot;/v1/agents/:agent_id/presence&quot; not in market:
    # place after providers agents list endpoint block, find that block end by locating reply.send({ agents: r.rows });
    idx = market.find(&#x27;reply.send({ agents: r.rows });&#x27;)
    if idx != -1:
        insert_at = market.find(&quot;\n  /**&quot;, idx)
        if insert_at == -1:

        market = market[:insert_at] + &quot;\n&quot; + presence_routes + &quot;\n&quot; + market[insert_at:]

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Готово — **v0.6** как “продолжение” твоей идеи: добавил *anti-«калькулятор» политики*, *pro bono режим*, *idle/availability для агентов* и *авто-подбор агентов под задачу* (suggestions).

[Скачать delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.6.zip](sandbox:/mnt/data/delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.6.zip)

---

## Что добавлено в v0.6 (по пунктам)

### 1) Политики маркетплейса (anti low-value)
**Миграция:** `migrations/004_marketplace_policies_and_availability.sql`  
**Таблица:** `marketplace_policies`

Поля (MVP, scope=`global`):
- `min_budget_cents` (JSON): минимум бюджета по категориям
- `min_description_len`: минимум длины описания
- `require_deliverables`: требовать список deliverables
- `require_acceptance_criteria`: требовать acceptance criteria при принятии offer
- `low_complexity_daily_limit`: дневной лимит «низкосложных» job’ов на tenant

**Админ-ручки:**
- `GET /v1/marketplace/policies` (header `X-Admin: true`)
- `PUT /v1/marketplace/policies` (header `X-Admin: true`)

---

### 2) Job расширен: deliverables + pro bono + complexity_score
**БД:** таблица `jobs` расширена:
- `deliverables` (jsonb array)
- `is_pro_bono` (bool)
- `complexity_score` (int 0..100)

**API create job:**
`POST /v1/jobs` теперь принимает:
- `deliverables: string[]` (по умолчанию `[]`)
- `is_pro_bono: boolean` (по умолчанию `false`)

---

### 3) Автоматическая “оценка сложности” + дневной лимит на «простые» job’ы
**Код:** `src/routes/marketplace.ts`

При создании job:
- вычисляется `complexity_score` (детерминированная эвристика по длине текста + deliverables + “структурные” слова)
- если `complexity_score &lt; 25` и job не pro bono:
  - увеличивается счётчик в `tenant_low_complexity_day`
  - если превысили `low_complexity_daily_limit` → `429`

---

### 4) Жёсткие анти-«калькулятор» правила
При создании job:
- если НЕ pro bono: бюджет должен быть **&gt;= min_budget_cents[category]**
- описание должно быть **&gt;= min_description_len**
- если включено `require_deliverables`: deliverables должны быть **не пустые**

При принятии offer:
- если включено `require_acceptance_criteria`: нельзя принять offer с `{}` критериями

---

### 5) Pro bono режим (бесплатные задачи)
- Если job `is_pro_bono=true` → `budget_cents` **обязан быть 0**
- Для offers:
  - если job pro bono → `price_cents` **обязан быть 0**
  - если job НЕ pro bono → `price_cents` **&gt; 0**

---

### 6) Idle/availability для агентов + “suggest agents”
**БД:** `agent_presence`  
**Endpoints:**
- `POST /v1/agents/:agent_id/presence` (провайдер выставляет статус)
- `GET /v1/agents/idle?category=code` (список простаивающих)
- `GET /v1/jobs/:job_id/suggest-agents` (подбор idle агентов под категорию job)

Payload presence:
```json
{
  &quot;status&quot;: &quot;idle&quot;,
  &quot;categories&quot;: [&quot;code&quot;,&quot;research&quot;],
  &quot;max_hours&quot;: 8,
  &quot;busy_until&quot;: &quot;2026-02-02T12:00:00.000Z&quot;
}
```

---

## Как это напрямую закрывает твою идею “сдавать простаивающих агентов в аренду”

### A) “Простаивание” стало явным состоянием (idle)
Провайдер выставляет `idle`, указывает категории — и дальше заказчик может:
- смотреть `/v1/agents/idle`
- либо получать `/v1/jobs/:job_id/suggest-agents`

### B) “Калькуляторные” задачи технически подавляются
Три уровня блокировки:
1) **минимальный бюджет** по категории  
2) **минимальная длина ТЗ**  
3) **deliverables обязателен**  
+ доп. “предохранитель”: **лимит** на низкосложные job’ы в сутки

### C) Pro bono — отдельный канал (без смешения с платным рынком)
Pro bono job/offer обязан быть 0 по цене → не ломает ценовой рынок.

---

## Что логично сделать следующим продолжением (v0.7), если продолжаем
Чтобы это стало **реальным “рынком аренды простаивающих агентов”**, а не только “листингом”, обычно нужны:

1) **Авто-матчинг + авто-bidding**
- job публикуется → система предлагает провайдерам/агентам → провайдер “одним кликом” отправляет offer
- (или авто-offer по шаблону, если провайдер разрешил)

2) **Очередь задач и планировщик**
- справедливая очередь idle агентов
- rate limiting по провайдеру и по заказчику

3) **Trust/tiers и ограничения на данные**
- D2/D3 только для trusted tier
- pro bono только для “verified org” (чтобы не злоупотребляли)

Если хочешь — я **без вопросов продолжу** и сделаю v0.7 именно в этом направлении: авто-bidding + очередь + trust tiers на основе `trust_tier` у providers + запреты по data_class.

--- ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЬ ---
Продолжение

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Продолжаю до **v0.7**: добавляю *auto-bidding* для idle-агентов (настройки провайдера), *match-queue/очередь*, *trust-tiers + ограничения по data_class*, и *pro bono только для verified-организаций*. Затем соберу новый zip.

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
from pathlib import Path
import shutil, zipfile, json, textwrap, os, re, datetime

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)
v06_zip = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.6.zip&quot;
proj = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.7&quot;

if proj.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(proj)
proj.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

with zipfile.ZipFile(v06_zip, &quot;r&quot;) as zf:
    zf.extractall(proj)

def w(rel, content):
    p = proj / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

def r(rel):
    return (proj / rel).read_text(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

# bump package version
pkg = json.loads(r(&quot;package.json&quot;))
pkg[&quot;version&quot;] = &quot;0.7.0&quot;
w(&quot;package.json&quot;, json.dumps(pkg, indent=2))

# Migration 005
w(&quot;migrations/005_marketplace_matching_trust_and_verified_orgs.sql&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
-- v0.7: matching queue + auto-bid settings + trust-tier data-class gates + verified orgs for pro bono

-- Providers: add auto-bid configuration
ALTER TABLE providers
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_categories jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;[]&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_min_complexity int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_max_daily int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_price_floor_cents jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{}&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_proposal_template text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now();

-- Jobs: add requested data_class (privacy/sensitivity for trust gating)
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS data_class text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;D1&#x27;;

-- Marketplace policies: pro bono requires verified org + max data class by trust tier
ALTER TABLE marketplace_policies
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pro_bono_requires_verified_org boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS max_data_class_by_trust_tier jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{&quot;0&quot;:&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;1&quot;:&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;3&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;4&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;5&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;}&#x27;::jsonb;

-- Verified org registry (for pro bono posting)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verified_orgs (
  tenant_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name text NOT NULL,
  verified_by text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Match queue: pending jobs to be matched with idle agents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_match_queue (
  job_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;pending&#x27;, -- pending|matched|skipped
  attempts int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_attempt_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Matches: suggested or auto-offered pairing
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_matches (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  job_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  agent_id uuid REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  match_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;suggested&#x27;, -- suggested|offered|declined|expired
  offer_id uuid REFERENCES offers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_job ON job_matches(job_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_provider ON job_matches(provider_tenant_id, created_at DESC);

-- Provider auto-bid daily limiter
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS provider_autobid_day (
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  day date NOT NULL,
  count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (provider_tenant_id, day)
);
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# Services: matcher
w(&quot;src/services/matcher.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { Pool, PoolClient } from &quot;pg&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { getGlobalPolicy } from &quot;./marketplace_policies.js&quot;;

function rankIdleAgent(row: any): number {
  // Lower is better
  const idleSince = row.idle_since ? new Date(row.idle_since).getTime() : Date.now();
  return idleSince;
}

function maxAllowedDataClassForTrust(policy: any, trustTier: number): string {
  const map = policy.max_data_class_by_trust_tier ?? {};
  const key = String(Math.max(0, Math.min(5, trustTier)));
  return String(map[key] ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
}

function cmpDataClass(a: string, b: string): number {
  // D0 &lt; D1 &lt; D2 &lt; D3
  const order: any = { D0: 0, D1: 1, D2: 2, D3: 3 };
  return (order[a] ?? 99) - (order[b] ?? 99);
}

function todayISODate(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

export type MatchRunResult = {
  processed: number;
  matched: number;
  offers_created: number;
  skipped: number;
};

async function incrementAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string) {
  const day = todayISODate();
  await c.query(
    `INSERT INTO provider_autobid_day (provider_tenant_id, day, count)
     VALUES ($1, $2, 1)
     ON CONFLICT (provider_tenant_id, day)
     DO UPDATE SET count=provider_autobid_day.count+1`,
    [providerTenantId, day]
  );
}

async function getAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string): Promise&lt;number&gt; {
  const day = todayISODate();
  const r = await c.query(`SELECT count FROM provider_autobid_day WHERE provider_tenant_id=$1 AND day=$2`, [providerTenantId, day]);
  return r.rowCount ? Number(r.rows[0].count) : 0;
}

export async function runMatchingOnce(db: Pool, limitJobs = 20): Promise&lt;MatchRunResult&gt; {
  const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(db);

  const res: MatchRunResult = { processed: 0, matched: 0, offers_created: 0, skipped: 0 };

  // fetch pending jobs to match
  const q = await db.query(
    `SELECT q.job_id, j.category, j.budget_cents, j.currency, j.complexity_score, j.is_pro_bono, j.data_class, j.tenant_id AS requester_tenant_id
     FROM job_match_queue q
     JOIN jobs j ON j.id=q.job_id
     WHERE q.status=&#x27;pending&#x27;
     ORDER BY q.created_at ASC
     LIMIT $1`,
    [limitJobs]
  );

  for (const row of q.rows) {
    res.processed += 1;

    const jobId = row.job_id as string;
    const category = String(row.category);
    const complexity = Number(row.complexity_score ?? 0);
    const isProBono = Boolean(row.is_pro_bono);
    const jobDataClass = String(row.data_class ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
    const requesterTenantId = String(row.requester_tenant_id);

    // Only auto-bid for sufficiently complex jobs by default (avoid &quot;calculator&quot; spam)
    // Pro bono: allow if verified org (enforced on creation), and still must meet min_complexity of provider.
    const tx = await db.connect();
    try {
      await tx.query(&quot;BEGIN&quot;);

      // bump attempts
      await tx.query(
        `UPDATE job_match_queue SET attempts=attempts+1, last_attempt_at=now(), updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`,
        [jobId]
      );

      // Choose candidate providers with auto-bid enabled and category included and within trust/data-class gates.
      const providers = await tx.query(
        `SELECT tenant_id, trust_tier, auto_bid_min_complexity, auto_bid_max_daily, auto_bid_categories, auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template
         FROM providers
         WHERE auto_bid_enabled=true`
      );

      // Build best candidate across providers: each provider contributes at most 1 agent (best idle agent)
      let best: { provider_tenant_id: string; agent_id: string; score: number; trust_tier: number; price_floor: number; template: string | null; max_daily: number; min_complexity: number } | null = null;

      for (const p of providers.rows) {
        const providerTenantId = String(p.tenant_id);
        const trustTier = Number(p.trust_tier ?? 0);
        const minComplexity = Number(p.auto_bid_min_complexity ?? 30);
        const maxDaily = Number(p.auto_bid_max_daily ?? 20);

        // category filter
        const cats = Array.isArray(p.auto_bid_categories) ? p.auto_bid_categories : [];
        if (cats.length &amp;&amp; !cats.includes(category)) continue;

        // complexity filter
        if (complexity &lt; minComplexity) continue;

        // daily limit
        const used = await getAutobidCount(tx, providerTenantId);
        if (maxDaily &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; used &gt;= maxDaily) continue;

        // trust/data-class gate
        const maxAllowed = maxAllowedDataClassForTrust(policy, trustTier);
        if (cmpDataClass(jobDataClass, maxAllowed) &gt; 0) continue;

        // must have at least one idle agent in that category (or general)
        const idle = await tx.query(
          `SELECT a.id, p.idle_since
           FROM agents a
           JOIN agent_presence p ON p.agent_id=a.id
           WHERE a.provider_tenant_id=$1
             AND a.is_active=true
             AND p.status=&#x27;idle&#x27;
             AND (p.categories ? $2 OR $2=&#x27;general&#x27;)
           LIMIT 50`,
          [providerTenantId, category]
        );
        if (idle.rowCount === 0) continue;

        // pick best idle agent (oldest idle_since)
        const sorted = [...idle.rows].sort((x, y) =&gt; rankIdleAgent(x) - rankIdleAgent(y));
        const agentId = String(sorted[0].id);

        // score: prefer longer idle and higher trust tier slightly
        const baseScore = 1000 - Math.min(900, Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - (sorted[0].idle_since ? new Date(sorted[0].idle_since).getTime() : Date.now())) / (60_000))));
        const score = baseScore + trustTier * 5;

        // price floor
        const pfMap = p.auto_bid_price_floor_cents ?? {};
        const pf = Number(pfMap[category] ?? 0);

        const tpl = p.auto_bid_proposal_template ? String(p.auto_bid_proposal_template) : null;

        if (!best || score &gt; best.score) {
          best = { provider_tenant_id: providerTenantId, agent_id: agentId, score, trust_tier: trustTier, price_floor: pf, template: tpl, max_daily: maxDaily, min_complexity: minComplexity };
        }
      }

      if (!best) {
        // no match candidates — keep pending for later, but mark as skipped if too many attempts
        const attempts = await tx.query(`SELECT attempts FROM job_match_queue WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        const a = attempts.rowCount ? Number(attempts.rows[0].attempts) : 0;
        if (a &gt;= 10) {
          await tx.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;skipped&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
          res.skipped += 1;
        }
        await tx.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      // Create match record
      const matchR = await tx.query(
        `INSERT INTO job_matches (job_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, match_score, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,&#x27;suggested&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, best.score]
      );

      // Auto-create offer (auto-bid) — if job is open.
      const job = await tx.query(`SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [jobId]);
      if (job.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Job not found&quot;, 404);
      if (job.rows[0].status !== &quot;open&quot;) {
        await tx.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        res.matched += 1;
        await tx.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      // Enforce pro bono pricing: offer price must be 0
      let price = 0;
      if (!isProBono) {
        // choose price: clamp between price_floor and job budget (if budget set)
        const budget = Number(job.rows[0].budget_cents ?? 0);
        const base = budget &gt; 0 ? budget : Math.max(best.price_floor, 1);
        price = Math.max(best.price_floor, base);
        // If budget was set, do not exceed it (auto-bid should be conservative)
        if (budget &gt; 0) price = Math.min(price, budget);
        if (price &lt;= 0) price = Math.max(1, best.price_floor);
      }

      const template = best.template ?? &quot;Auto-bid: I can deliver the requested work with clear deliverables and iterative milestones.&quot;;
      const proposal = `${template}\n\n[Auto-bid] Category: ${category}. Complexity: ${complexity}. Data class: ${jobDataClass}.`;

      const offerR = await tx.query(
        `INSERT INTO offers (job_id, requester_tenant_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, proposal, price_cents, currency, eta_hours, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,24,&#x27;submitted&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, requesterTenantId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, proposal, price, String(job.rows[0].currency ?? &quot;EUR&quot;)]
      );

      await tx.query(`UPDATE job_matches SET status=&#x27;offered&#x27;, offer_id=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`, [offerR.rows[0].id, matchR.rows[0].id]);
      await tx.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);

      // increment provider daily auto-bid count
      await incrementAutobidCount(tx, best.provider_tenant_id);

      res.matched += 1;
      res.offers_created += 1;

      await tx.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
    } catch (e) {
      try:
        await tx.query(&quot;ROLLBACK&quot;)
      except Exception:
        pass
      throw e
    } finally {
      tx.release();
    }
  }

  return res;
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# Fix accidental python syntax in matcher.ts (rollback/except). We&#x27;ll correct file right away.
matcher = r(&quot;src/services/matcher.ts&quot;)
matcher = matcher.replace(&quot;      try:\n        await tx.query(\&quot;ROLLBACK\&quot;)\n      except Exception:\n        pass\n      throw e&quot;, 
                          &quot;      try {\n        await tx.query(\&quot;ROLLBACK\&quot;);\n      } catch {\n        // ignore\n      }\n      throw e;&quot;)

      // Trust/data-class gate: provider trust tier must allow job.data_class (privacy/sensitivity)

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Пересобираю **v0.7** заново одним проходом: распакую v0.6, применю миграции/роуты/сервисы для auto-bid+match-queue+trust gates+verified-orgs и упакую новый zip.

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
from pathlib import Path
import shutil, zipfile, json, textwrap, os, re

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)
v06_zip = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.6.zip&quot;
assert v06_zip.exists(), f&quot;Missing {v06_zip}&quot;

proj = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.7&quot;
if proj.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(proj)
proj.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

with zipfile.ZipFile(v06_zip, &quot;r&quot;) as zf:
    zf.extractall(proj)

def w(rel, content):
    p = proj / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

def r(rel):
    return (proj / rel).read_text(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

# bump version
pkg = json.loads(r(&quot;package.json&quot;))
pkg[&quot;version&quot;] = &quot;0.7.0&quot;
w(&quot;package.json&quot;, json.dumps(pkg, indent=2))

# migration 005
w(&quot;migrations/005_marketplace_matching_trust_and_verified_orgs.sql&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
-- v0.7: matching queue + auto-bid settings + trust-tier data-class gates + verified orgs for pro bono

-- Providers: add auto-bid configuration
ALTER TABLE providers
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_categories jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;[]&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_min_complexity int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_max_daily int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_price_floor_cents jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{}&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_proposal_template text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now();

-- Jobs: add requested data_class (privacy/sensitivity for trust gating)
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS data_class text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;D1&#x27;;

-- Marketplace policies: pro bono requires verified org + max data class by trust tier
ALTER TABLE marketplace_policies
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pro_bono_requires_verified_org boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS max_data_class_by_trust_tier jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{&quot;0&quot;:&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;1&quot;:&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;3&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;4&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;5&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;}&#x27;::jsonb;

-- Verified org registry (for pro bono posting)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verified_orgs (
  tenant_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name text NOT NULL,
  verified_by text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Match queue: pending jobs to be matched with idle agents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_match_queue (
  job_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;pending&#x27;, -- pending|matched|skipped
  attempts int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_attempt_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Matches: suggested or auto-offered pairing
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_matches (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  job_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  agent_id uuid REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  match_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;suggested&#x27;, -- suggested|offered|declined|expired
  offer_id uuid REFERENCES offers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_job ON job_matches(job_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_provider ON job_matches(provider_tenant_id, created_at DESC);

-- Provider auto-bid daily limiter
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS provider_autobid_day (
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  day date NOT NULL,
  count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (provider_tenant_id, day)
);
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# matcher service
w(&quot;src/services/matcher.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { Pool, PoolClient } from &quot;pg&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { getGlobalPolicy } from &quot;./marketplace_policies.js&quot;;

function todayISODate(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function cmpDataClass(a: string, b: string): number {
  const order: Record&lt;string, number&gt; = { D0: 0, D1: 1, D2: 2, D3: 3 };
  return (order[a] ?? 99) - (order[b] ?? 99);
}

function maxAllowedDataClass(policy: any, trustTier: number): string {
  const map = policy.max_data_class_by_trust_tier ?? {};
  const key = String(Math.max(0, Math.min(5, trustTier)));
  return String(map[key] ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
}

async function getAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string): Promise&lt;number&gt; {
  const day = todayISODate();
  const r = await c.query(`SELECT count FROM provider_autobid_day WHERE provider_tenant_id=$1 AND day=$2`, [providerTenantId, day]);
  return r.rowCount ? Number(r.rows[0].count) : 0;
}

async function incrementAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string): Promise&lt;void&gt; {
  const day = todayISODate();
  await c.query(
    `INSERT INTO provider_autobid_day (provider_tenant_id, day, count)
     VALUES ($1, $2, 1)
     ON CONFLICT (provider_tenant_id, day)
     DO UPDATE SET count=provider_autobid_day.count+1`,
    [providerTenantId, day]
  );
}

function chooseOldestIdleAgent(idleRows: any[]): { agent_id: string; idle_since: string | null } {
  const sorted = [...idleRows].sort((x, y) =&gt; {
    const ax = x.idle_since ? new Date(x.idle_since).getTime() : Date.now();
    const ay = y.idle_since ? new Date(y.idle_since).getTime() : Date.now();
    return ax - ay; // oldest first
  });
  return { agent_id: String(sorted[0].id), idle_since: sorted[0].idle_since ?? null };
}

export type MatchRunResult = {
  processed: number;
  matched: number;
  offers_created: number;
  skipped: number;
};

export async function runMatchingOnce(db: Pool, limitJobs = 20): Promise&lt;MatchRunResult&gt; {
  const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(db);
  const out: MatchRunResult = { processed: 0, matched: 0, offers_created: 0, skipped: 0 };

  const q = await db.query(
    `SELECT q.job_id, j.category, j.budget_cents, j.currency, j.complexity_score, j.is_pro_bono, j.data_class, j.tenant_id AS requester_tenant_id
     FROM job_match_queue q
     JOIN jobs j ON j.id=q.job_id
     WHERE q.status=&#x27;pending&#x27;
     ORDER BY q.created_at ASC
     LIMIT $1`,
    [limitJobs]
  );

  for (const row of q.rows) {
    out.processed += 1;

    const jobId = String(row.job_id);
    const category = String(row.category);
    const complexity = Number(row.complexity_score ?? 0);
    const isProBono = Boolean(row.is_pro_bono);
    const jobDataClass = String(row.data_class ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
    const requesterTenantId = String(row.requester_tenant_id);

    const c = await db.connect();
    try {
      await c.query(&quot;BEGIN&quot;);

      // bump attempts
      await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET attempts=attempts+1, last_attempt_at=now(), updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);

      // read job state for update
      const job = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [jobId]);
      if (job.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Job not found&quot;, 404);

      // If not open, consider it matched (no need to auto-bid)
      if (job.rows[0].status !== &quot;open&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        out.matched += 1;
        await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      // Candidate providers with auto-bid enabled
      const providers = await c.query(
        `SELECT tenant_id, trust_tier, auto_bid_min_complexity, auto_bid_max_daily, auto_bid_categories,
                auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template
         FROM providers
         WHERE auto_bid_enabled=true`
      );

      let best: null | {
        provider_tenant_id: string;
        agent_id: string;
        score: number;
        trust_tier: number;
        price_floor: number;
        template: string | null;
        max_daily: number;
        min_complexity: number;
      } = null;

      for (const p of providers.rows) {
        const providerTenantId = String(p.tenant_id);
        const trustTier = Number(p.trust_tier ?? 0);
        const minComplexity = Number(p.auto_bid_min_complexity ?? 30);
        const maxDaily = Number(p.auto_bid_max_daily ?? 20);

        const cats = Array.isArray(p.auto_bid_categories) ? p.auto_bid_categories : [];
        if (cats.length &amp;&amp; !cats.includes(category)) continue;
        if (complexity &lt; minComplexity) continue;

        const used = await getAutobidCount(c, providerTenantId);
        if (maxDaily &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; used &gt;= maxDaily) continue;

        const maxAllowed = maxAllowedDataClass(policy, trustTier);
        if (cmpDataClass(jobDataClass, maxAllowed) &gt; 0) continue;

        // find idle agents for provider
        const idle = await c.query(
          `SELECT a.id, ap.idle_since
           FROM agents a
           JOIN agent_presence ap ON ap.agent_id=a.id
           WHERE a.provider_tenant_id=$1 AND a.is_active=true AND ap.status=&#x27;idle&#x27;
             AND (ap.categories ? $2 OR $2=&#x27;general&#x27;)
           LIMIT 50`,
          [providerTenantId, category]
        );
        if (idle.rowCount === 0) continue;

        const chosen = chooseOldestIdleAgent(idle.rows);
        // scoring: older idle gets higher score, trust tier slight bonus
        const idleMs = chosen.idle_since ? (Date.now() - new Date(chosen.idle_since).getTime()) : 0;
        const score = Math.min(100000, Math.floor(idleMs / 1000)) + trustTier * 100;

        const pfMap = p.auto_bid_price_floor_cents ?? {};
        const pf = Number(pfMap[category] ?? 0);
        const tpl = p.auto_bid_proposal_template ? String(p.auto_bid_proposal_template) : null;

        if (!best || score &gt; best.score) {
          best = { provider_tenant_id: providerTenantId, agent_id: chosen.agent_id, score, trust_tier: trustTier, price_floor: pf, template: tpl, max_daily: maxDaily, min_complexity: minComplexity };
        }
      }

      if (!best) {
        // no match candidates — mark skipped after many attempts
        const attempts = await c.query(`SELECT attempts FROM job_match_queue WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        const a = attempts.rowCount ? Number(attempts.rows[0].attempts) : 0;
        if (a &gt;= 10) {
          await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;skipped&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
          out.skipped += 1;
        }
        await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      // Create match record
      const matchR = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO job_matches (job_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, match_score, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,&#x27;suggested&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, best.score]
      );

      // Auto-create offer (auto-bid)
      let price = 0;
      if (!isProBono) {
        const budget = Number(job.rows[0].budget_cents ?? 0);
        if (budget &gt; 0) {
          price = Math.max(best.price_floor, Math.min(budget, budget)); // conservative = budget
        } else {
          price = Math.max(best.price_floor, 1);
        }
        if (price &lt;= 0) price = 1;
      }

      const template = best.template ?? &quot;Auto-bid: I can deliver the requested work with clear deliverables and iterative milestones.&quot;;
      const proposal = `${template}\n\n[Auto-bid] Category: ${category}. Complexity: ${complexity}. Data class: ${jobDataClass}.`;

      const offerR = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO offers (job_id, requester_tenant_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, proposal, price_cents, currency, eta_hours, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,24,&#x27;submitted&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, requesterTenantId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, proposal, price, String(job.rows[0].currency ?? &quot;EUR&quot;)]
      );

      await c.query(`UPDATE job_matches SET status=&#x27;offered&#x27;, offer_id=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`, [offerR.rows[0].id, matchR.rows[0].id]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);

      await incrementAutobidCount(c, best.provider_tenant_id);

      out.matched += 1;
      out.offers_created += 1;

      await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
    } catch (e):
      try:
        await c.query(&quot;ROLLBACK&quot;)
      except Exception:
        pass
      raise
    finally:
      c.release()

  return out;
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

matcher = matcher.replace(&quot;    finally:\n      c.release()&quot;, &quot;    } finally {\n      c.release();\n    }&quot;)

# Ensure file ends correctly; remove any stray triple quotes or python artifacts

    &quot;[tenantId, body.title, body.description, body.category, body.budget_cents, body.currency, JSON.stringify(body.deliverables ?? []), body.is_pro_bono, complexity, body.data_class]&quot;

  /**
   * Provider auto-bid configuration (controls &quot;idle agents rent out&quot; behavior)

        `UPDATE providers
         SET auto_bid_enabled=$2,
             auto_bid_categories=$3::jsonb,

                   auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template`,

         JSON.stringify(body.price_floor_cents ?? {}), body.proposal_template ?? null]
      );

    });

    reply.send({ config: out });
  });

# Add verified org + matcher run admin endpoints
if &#x27;&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;&#x27; not in market:
    marker = &#x27;app.put(&quot;/v1/marketplace/policies&quot;&#x27;
    mpos = market.find(marker)
    mend = market.find(&quot;});&quot;, mpos)
    mend_line = market.find(&quot;\n&quot;, mend) + 1
    admin_block = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  /**
   * Verified orgs registry (pro bono gate) - admin-only in MVP
   */
  app.get(&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const r = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM verified_orgs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 500`);
    reply.send({ verified_orgs: r.rows });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const body = parseBody(VerifiedOrgSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      await c.query(`INSERT INTO tenants (id, name) VALUES ($1,$2) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING`, [body.tenant_id, body.name]);
      const r = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO verified_orgs (tenant_id, name, verified_by)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3)
         ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET name=EXCLUDED.name, verified_by=EXCLUDED.verified_by
         RETURNING *`,
        [body.tenant_id, body.name, body.verified_by ?? null]
      );
      return r.rows[0];
    });

    reply.code(201).send({ verified_org: out });
  });

  /**
   * Matcher run (manual trigger, admin-only). Processes match queue and may auto-create offers.
   */
  app.post(&quot;/v1/marketplace/match/run&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const limit = Number((req.query as any)?.limit ?? 20);
    const result = await runMatchingOnce(app.db as any, Math.min(200, Math.max(1, limit)));
    reply.send({ result });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:mend_line] + &quot;\n&quot; + admin_block + &quot;\n&quot; + market[mend_line:]

# Add job matches listing
if &#x27;&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/matches&quot;&#x27; not in market:
    # insert after GET /v1/jobs/:job_id endpoint
    gpos = market.find(&#x27;app.get(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id&quot;&#x27;)
    gend = market.find(&quot;  });&quot;, gpos)
    gend_line = market.find(&quot;\n&quot;, gend) + 1
    match_list = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  app.get(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/matches&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    tenantIdFrom(req);
    const jobId = (req.params as any).job_id as string;
    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT m.*, a.name AS agent_name
       FROM job_matches m
       LEFT JOIN agents a ON a.id=m.agent_id
       WHERE m.job_id=$1
       ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
       LIMIT 200`,
      [jobId]
    );
    reply.send({ matches: r.rows });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:gend_line] + &quot;\n&quot; + match_list + &quot;\n&quot; + market[gend_line:]

# Trust/data-class enforcement in offer creation: insert after job open check
offer_pos = market.find(&#x27;app.post(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/offers&quot;&#x27;)
if offer_pos != -1 and &quot;DATA_CLASS_NOT_ALLOWED&quot; not in market[offer_pos:offer_pos+2500]:
    # find the job open check string
    open_check = &#x27;      if (job.rows[0].status !== &quot;open&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Job not open&quot;, 409, { status: job.rows[0].status });\n&#x27;
    if open_check in market:
        gate = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
      // Trust/data-class gate: provider trust tier must allow job.data_class (privacy/sensitivity)
      const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(app.db as any);
      const trustR = await c.query(`SELECT trust_tier FROM providers WHERE tenant_id=$1`, [providerTenantId]);
      const trustTier = trustR.rowCount ? Number(trustR.rows[0].trust_tier ?? 0) : 0;
      const maxMap = (policy as any).max_data_class_by_trust_tier ?? {};
      const maxAllowed = String(maxMap[String(Math.max(0, Math.min(5, trustTier)))] ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
      const order: any = { D0: 0, D1: 1, D2: 2, D3: 3 };
      const jobDC = String(job.rows[0].data_class ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
      if ((order[jobDC] ?? 99) &gt; (order[maxAllowed] ?? 1)) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;DATA_CLASS_NOT_ALLOWED&quot;, &quot;Provider trust tier not allowed for job data_class&quot;, 403, {
          job_data_class: jobDC,
          max_allowed: maxAllowed,
          trust_tier: trustTier,
        });
      }

&quot;&quot;&quot;)
        market = market.replace(open_check, open_check + &quot;\n&quot; + gate)

w(&quot;src/routes/marketplace.ts&quot;, market)

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
from pathlib import Path
import shutil, zipfile, json, textwrap, os, re

base = Path(&quot;/mnt/data&quot;)
v06_zip = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.6.zip&quot;
proj = base / &quot;delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.7&quot;
if proj.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(proj)
proj.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

with zipfile.ZipFile(v06_zip, &quot;r&quot;) as zf:
    zf.extractall(proj)

def w(rel, content):
    p = proj / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

def r(rel):
    return (proj / rel).read_text(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

pkg[&quot;version&quot;] = &quot;0.7.0&quot;
w(&quot;package.json&quot;, json.dumps(pkg, indent=2))

# migration file
w(&quot;migrations/005_marketplace_matching_trust_and_verified_orgs.sql&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
-- v0.7: matching queue + auto-bid settings + trust-tier data-class gates + verified orgs for pro bono

-- Providers: add auto-bid configuration
ALTER TABLE providers
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_categories jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;[]&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_min_complexity int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_max_daily int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_price_floor_cents jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{}&#x27;::jsonb,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_bid_proposal_template text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now();

-- Jobs: add requested data_class (privacy/sensitivity for trust gating)
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS data_class text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;D1&#x27;;

-- Marketplace policies: pro bono requires verified org + max data class by trust tier
ALTER TABLE marketplace_policies
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pro_bono_requires_verified_org boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS max_data_class_by_trust_tier jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;{&quot;0&quot;:&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;1&quot;:&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;3&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;4&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;,&quot;5&quot;:&quot;D3&quot;}&#x27;::jsonb;

-- Verified org registry (for pro bono posting)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verified_orgs (
  tenant_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name text NOT NULL,
  verified_by text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Match queue: pending jobs to be matched with idle agents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_match_queue (
  job_id uuid PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;pending&#x27;, -- pending|matched|skipped
  attempts int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_attempt_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

-- Matches: suggested or auto-offered pairing
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_matches (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  job_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  agent_id uuid REFERENCES agents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  match_score int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT &#x27;suggested&#x27;, -- suggested|offered|declined|expired
  offer_id uuid REFERENCES offers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_job ON job_matches(job_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_matches_provider ON job_matches(provider_tenant_id, created_at DESC);

-- Provider auto-bid daily limiter
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS provider_autobid_day (
  provider_tenant_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES providers(tenant_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  day date NOT NULL,
  count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (provider_tenant_id, day)
);
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# matcher service clean TS
w(&quot;src/services/matcher.ts&quot;, textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
import { Pool, PoolClient } from &quot;pg&quot;;
import { AppError } from &quot;../errors.js&quot;;
import { getGlobalPolicy } from &quot;./marketplace_policies.js&quot;;

function todayISODate(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function dataClassOrder(dc: string): number {
  // D0 &lt; D1 &lt; D2 &lt; D3
  const order: Record&lt;string, number&gt; = { D0: 0, D1: 1, D2: 2, D3: 3 };
  return order[dc] ?? 99;
}

function maxAllowedDataClass(policy: any, trustTier: number): string {
  const map = policy.max_data_class_by_trust_tier ?? {};
  const key = String(Math.max(0, Math.min(5, trustTier)));
  return String(map[key] ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
}

async function getAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string): Promise&lt;number&gt; {
  const day = todayISODate();
  const r = await c.query(
    `SELECT count FROM provider_autobid_day WHERE provider_tenant_id=$1 AND day=$2`,
    [providerTenantId, day]
  );
  return r.rowCount ? Number(r.rows[0].count) : 0;
}

async function incrementAutobidCount(c: PoolClient, providerTenantId: string): Promise&lt;void&gt; {
  const day = todayISODate();
  await c.query(
    `INSERT INTO provider_autobid_day (provider_tenant_id, day, count)
     VALUES ($1, $2, 1)
     ON CONFLICT (provider_tenant_id, day)
     DO UPDATE SET count=provider_autobid_day.count+1`,
    [providerTenantId, day]
  );
}

function chooseOldestIdleAgent(idleRows: any[]): { agent_id: string; idle_since: string | null } {
  const sorted = [...idleRows].sort((x, y) =&gt; {
    const ax = x.idle_since ? new Date(x.idle_since).getTime() : Date.now();
    const ay = y.idle_since ? new Date(y.idle_since).getTime() : Date.now();
    return ax - ay; // oldest first
  });
  return { agent_id: String(sorted[0].id), idle_since: sorted[0].idle_since ?? null };
}

export type MatchRunResult = {
  processed: number;
  matched: number;
  offers_created: number;
  skipped: number;
};

export async function runMatchingOnce(db: Pool, limitJobs = 20): Promise&lt;MatchRunResult&gt; {
  const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(db);
  const out: MatchRunResult = { processed: 0, matched: 0, offers_created: 0, skipped: 0 };

  const q = await db.query(
    `SELECT q.job_id, j.category, j.complexity_score, j.is_pro_bono, j.data_class, j.tenant_id AS requester_tenant_id
     FROM job_match_queue q
     JOIN jobs j ON j.id=q.job_id
     WHERE q.status=&#x27;pending&#x27;
     ORDER BY q.created_at ASC
     LIMIT $1`,
    [limitJobs]
  );

  for (const row of q.rows) {
    out.processed += 1;

    const jobId = String(row.job_id);
    const category = String(row.category);
    const complexity = Number(row.complexity_score ?? 0);
    const isProBono = Boolean(row.is_pro_bono);
    const jobDataClass = String(row.data_class ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
    const requesterTenantId = String(row.requester_tenant_id);

    const c = await db.connect();
    try {
      await c.query(&quot;BEGIN&quot;);

      await c.query(
        `UPDATE job_match_queue SET attempts=attempts+1, last_attempt_at=now(), updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`,
        [jobId]
      );

      const job = await c.query(`SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id=$1 FOR UPDATE`, [jobId]);
      if (job.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;NOT_FOUND&quot;, &quot;Job not found&quot;, 404);

      if (job.rows[0].status !== &quot;open&quot;) {
        await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        out.matched += 1;
        await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      const providers = await c.query(
        `SELECT tenant_id, trust_tier, auto_bid_min_complexity, auto_bid_max_daily, auto_bid_categories,
                auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template
         FROM providers
         WHERE auto_bid_enabled=true`
      );

      let best: null | {
        provider_tenant_id: string;
        agent_id: string;
        score: number;
        trust_tier: number;
        price_floor: number;
        template: string | null;
        max_daily: number;
        min_complexity: number;
      } = null;

      for (const p of providers.rows) {
        const providerTenantId = String(p.tenant_id);
        const trustTier = Number(p.trust_tier ?? 0);
        const minComplexity = Number(p.auto_bid_min_complexity ?? 30);
        const maxDaily = Number(p.auto_bid_max_daily ?? 20);

        const cats = Array.isArray(p.auto_bid_categories) ? p.auto_bid_categories : [];
        if (cats.length &amp;&amp; !cats.includes(category)) continue;
        if (complexity &lt; minComplexity) continue;

        const used = await getAutobidCount(c, providerTenantId);
        if (maxDaily &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; used &gt;= maxDaily) continue;

        const maxAllowed = maxAllowedDataClass(policy, trustTier);
        if (dataClassOrder(jobDataClass) &gt; dataClassOrder(maxAllowed)) continue;

        const idle = await c.query(
          `SELECT a.id, ap.idle_since
           FROM agents a
           JOIN agent_presence ap ON ap.agent_id=a.id
           WHERE a.provider_tenant_id=$1 AND a.is_active=true AND ap.status=&#x27;idle&#x27;
             AND (ap.categories ? $2 OR $2=&#x27;general&#x27;)
           LIMIT 50`,
          [providerTenantId, category]
        );
        if (idle.rowCount === 0) continue;

        const chosen = chooseOldestIdleAgent(idle.rows);
        const idleMs = chosen.idle_since ? (Date.now() - new Date(chosen.idle_since).getTime()) : 0;
        const score = Math.min(100000000, Math.floor(idleMs / 1000)) + trustTier * 100;

        const pfMap = p.auto_bid_price_floor_cents ?? {};
        const pf = Number(pfMap[category] ?? 0);
        const tpl = p.auto_bid_proposal_template ? String(p.auto_bid_proposal_template) : null;

        if (!best || score &gt; best.score) {
          best = {
            provider_tenant_id: providerTenantId,
            agent_id: chosen.agent_id,
            score,
            trust_tier: trustTier,
            price_floor: pf,
            template: tpl,
            max_daily: maxDaily,
            min_complexity: minComplexity,
          };
        }
      }

      if (!best) {
        const attempts = await c.query(`SELECT attempts FROM job_match_queue WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
        const a = attempts.rowCount ? Number(attempts.rows[0].attempts) : 0;
        if (a &gt;= 10) {
          await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;skipped&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);
          out.skipped += 1;
        }
        await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
        continue;
      }

      const matchR = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO job_matches (job_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, match_score, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,&#x27;suggested&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, best.score]
      );

      // Auto-create offer (auto-bid)
      let price = 0;
      if (!isProBono) {
        const budget = Number(job.rows[0].budget_cents ?? 0);
        if (budget &gt; 0) {
          price = Math.max(best.price_floor, Math.min(budget, budget)); // conservative = budget
        } else {
          price = Math.max(best.price_floor, 1);
        }
        if (price &lt;= 0) price = 1;
      }

      const template = best.template ?? &quot;Auto-bid: I can deliver the requested work with clear deliverables and iterative milestones.&quot;;
      const proposal = `${template}\\n\\n[Auto-bid] Category: ${category}. Complexity: ${complexity}. Data class: ${jobDataClass}.`;

      const offerR = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO offers (job_id, requester_tenant_id, provider_tenant_id, agent_id, proposal, price_cents, currency, eta_hours, status)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,24,&#x27;submitted&#x27;)
         RETURNING *`,
        [jobId, requesterTenantId, best.provider_tenant_id, best.agent_id, proposal, price, String(job.rows[0].currency ?? &quot;EUR&quot;)]
      );

      await c.query(`UPDATE job_matches SET status=&#x27;offered&#x27;, offer_id=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE id=$2`, [
        offerR.rows[0].id,
        matchR.rows[0].id,
      ]);
      await c.query(`UPDATE job_match_queue SET status=&#x27;matched&#x27;, updated_at=now() WHERE job_id=$1`, [jobId]);

      await incrementAutobidCount(c, best.provider_tenant_id);

      out.matched += 1;
      out.offers_created += 1;

      await c.query(&quot;COMMIT&quot;);
    } catch (e) {
      try {
        await c.query(&quot;ROLLBACK&quot;);
      } catch {
        // ignore
      }
      throw e;
    } finally {
      c.release();
    }
  }

  return out;
}
&quot;&quot;&quot;))

# Now patch marketplace routes
market_path = proj / &quot;src/routes/marketplace.ts&quot;
market = market_path.read_text(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

# add matcher import
if &quot;runMatchingOnce&quot; not in market:
    market = market.replace(
        &#x27;import { getGlobalPolicy, upsertGlobalPolicy } from &quot;../services/marketplace_policies.js&quot;;&#x27;,
        &#x27;import { getGlobalPolicy, upsertGlobalPolicy } from &quot;../services/marketplace_policies.js&quot;;\nimport { runMatchingOnce } from &quot;../services/matcher.js&quot;;&#x27;
    )

# add data_class to CreateJobSchema
create_job_block = market[market.find(&quot;const CreateJobSchema&quot;):market.find(&quot;const CreateOfferSchema&quot;)]
if &quot;data_class&quot; not in create_job_block:
    market = market.replace(
        &#x27;  deliverables: z.array(z.string().min(1).max(200)).default([]),\n  is_pro_bono: z.boolean().default(false),\n});&#x27;,
        &#x27;  deliverables: z.array(z.string().min(1).max(200)).default([]),\n  is_pro_bono: z.boolean().default(false),\n  data_class: z.enum([&quot;D0&quot;,&quot;D1&quot;,&quot;D2&quot;,&quot;D3&quot;]).default(&quot;D1&quot;),\n});&#x27;
    )

# insert AutoBidConfigSchema and VerifiedOrgSchema after PolicyPatchSchema
if &quot;AutoBidConfigSchema&quot; not in market:
    m = re.search(r&quot;const PolicyPatchSchema = z\.object\(\{.*?\}\);\s*&quot;, market, flags=re.S)
    if not m:
        raise RuntimeError(&quot;PolicyPatchSchema not found&quot;)
    insert_at = m.end()
    block = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\

const AutoBidConfigSchema = z.object({
  enabled: z.boolean().default(false),
  categories: z.array(z.enum([&quot;general&quot;,&quot;code&quot;,&quot;research&quot;,&quot;design&quot;,&quot;ops&quot;,&quot;translation&quot;,&quot;math&quot;])).default([]),
  min_complexity: z.number().int().min(0).max(100).default(30),
  max_daily: z.number().int().min(0).max(1000).default(20),
  price_floor_cents: z.record(z.number().int().nonnegative()).default({}),
  proposal_template: z.string().min(0).max(5000).optional(),
});

const VerifiedOrgSchema = z.object({
  tenant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  name: z.string().min(2).max(200),
  verified_by: z.string().min(2).max(200).optional(),
});
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:insert_at] + block + market[insert_at:]

# Modify jobs insert statement to include data_class
market = market.replace(
    &quot;INSERT INTO jobs (tenant_id, title, description, category, budget_cents, currency, deliverables, is_pro_bono, complexity_score)&quot;,
    &quot;INSERT INTO jobs (tenant_id, title, description, category, budget_cents, currency, deliverables, is_pro_bono, complexity_score, data_class)&quot;
)
market = market.replace(
    &quot;VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7::jsonb,$8,$9)&quot;,
    &quot;VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7::jsonb,$8,$9,$10)&quot;
)
market = market.replace(
    &quot;[tenantId, body.title, body.description, body.category, body.budget_cents, body.currency, JSON.stringify(body.deliverables ?? []), body.is_pro_bono, complexity]&quot;,
    &quot;[tenantId, body.title, body.description, body.category, body.budget_cents, body.currency, JSON.stringify(body.deliverables ?? []), body.is_pro_bono, complexity, body.data_class]&quot;
)

# Pro bono verified org gate
needle = &#x27;if (body.is_pro_bono) {\n      if (body.budget_cents !== 0) throw new AppError(&quot;PRO_BONO_BUDGET_MUST_BE_ZERO&quot;, &quot;Pro bono jobs must have budget_cents=0&quot;, 400);\n&#x27;
if needle in market and &quot;PRO_BONO_VERIFIED_ORG_REQUIRED&quot; not in market:
    market = market.replace(
        needle,
        needle + &#x27;      if (policy.pro_bono_requires_verified_org) {\n        const v = await app.db.query(`SELECT tenant_id FROM verified_orgs WHERE tenant_id=$1`, [tenantId]);\n        if (v.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;PRO_BONO_VERIFIED_ORG_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Pro bono posting requires verified organization&quot;, 403);\n      }\n&#x27;
    )

# enqueue job into match queue before return r.rows[0] in tx
job_create_pos = market.find(&#x27;app.post(&quot;/v1/jobs&quot;&#x27;)
if job_create_pos != -1:
    ret_idx = market.find(&quot;return r.rows[0];&quot;, job_create_pos)
    if ret_idx != -1 and &quot;job_match_queue&quot; not in market[ret_idx-400:ret_idx+100]:
        snippet = &quot;      // enqueue for matching\n      await c.query(`INSERT INTO job_match_queue (job_id, status) VALUES ($1,&#x27;pending&#x27;) ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO NOTHING`, [r.rows[0].id]);\n\n      &quot;
        market = market[:ret_idx] + snippet + market[ret_idx:]

# provider auto-bid endpoints after /v1/providers/me creation
if &#x27;&quot;/v1/providers/me/auto-bid&quot;&#x27; not in market:
    ppos = market.find(&#x27;app.post(&quot;/v1/providers/me&quot;&#x27;)
    if ppos == -1:
        raise RuntimeError(&quot;providers/me endpoint not found&quot;)
    # find end of that endpoint close &quot;});&quot; at same indentation (two spaces)
    pend = market.find(&quot;  });&quot;, ppos)
    pend_line = market.find(&quot;\n&quot;, pend) + 1
    autobid_routes = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  /**
   * Provider auto-bid configuration (controls &quot;idle agents rent out&quot; behavior)
   */
  app.get(&quot;/v1/providers/me/auto-bid&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = tenantIdFrom(req);
    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT tenant_id, auto_bid_enabled, auto_bid_categories, auto_bid_min_complexity, auto_bid_max_daily,
              auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template
       FROM providers WHERE tenant_id=$1`,
      [tenantId]
    );
    if (r.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;PROVIDER_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Provider profile not found&quot;, 404);
    reply.send({ config: r.rows[0] });
  });

  app.put(&quot;/v1/providers/me/auto-bid&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const tenantId = tenantIdFrom(req);
    const body = parseBody(AutoBidConfigSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      const p = await c.query(`SELECT tenant_id FROM providers WHERE tenant_id=$1`, [tenantId]);
      if (p.rowCount === 0) throw new AppError(&quot;PROVIDER_REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;Provider profile not found. Create /v1/providers/me first.&quot;, 409);

      const r = await c.query(
        `UPDATE providers
         SET auto_bid_enabled=$2,
             auto_bid_categories=$3::jsonb,
             auto_bid_min_complexity=$4,
             auto_bid_max_daily=$5,
             auto_bid_price_floor_cents=$6::jsonb,
             auto_bid_proposal_template=$7,
             updated_at=now()
         WHERE tenant_id=$1
         RETURNING tenant_id, auto_bid_enabled, auto_bid_categories, auto_bid_min_complexity, auto_bid_max_daily,
                   auto_bid_price_floor_cents, auto_bid_proposal_template`,
        [tenantId, body.enabled, JSON.stringify(body.categories ?? []), body.min_complexity, body.max_daily,
         JSON.stringify(body.price_floor_cents ?? {}), body.proposal_template ?? null]
      );
      return r.rows[0];
    });

    reply.send({ config: out });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:pend_line] + &quot;\n&quot; + autobid_routes + &quot;\n&quot; + market[pend_line:]

# Add verified org admin endpoints and matcher run endpoint after /v1/marketplace/policies put
if &#x27;&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;&#x27; not in market:
    mpos = market.find(&#x27;app.put(&quot;/v1/marketplace/policies&quot;&#x27;)
    if mpos == -1:
        raise RuntimeError(&quot;marketplace/policies put not found&quot;)
    mend = market.find(&quot;  });&quot;, mpos)
    mend_line = market.find(&quot;\n&quot;, mend) + 1
    admin_block = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  /**
   * Verified orgs registry (pro bono gate) - admin-only in MVP
   */
  app.get(&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const r = await app.db.query(`SELECT * FROM verified_orgs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 500`);
    reply.send({ verified_orgs: r.rows });
  });

  app.post(&quot;/v1/marketplace/verified-orgs&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const body = parseBody(VerifiedOrgSchema, req.body);

    const out = await withTx(app.db, async (c) =&gt; {
      await c.query(`INSERT INTO tenants (id, name) VALUES ($1,$2) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING`, [body.tenant_id, body.name]);
      const r = await c.query(
        `INSERT INTO verified_orgs (tenant_id, name, verified_by)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3)
         ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET name=EXCLUDED.name, verified_by=EXCLUDED.verified_by
         RETURNING *`,
        [body.tenant_id, body.name, body.verified_by ?? null]
      );
      return r.rows[0];
    });

    reply.code(201).send({ verified_org: out });
  });

  /**
   * Matcher run (manual trigger, admin-only). Processes match queue and may auto-create offers.
   */
  app.post(&quot;/v1/marketplace/match/run&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    const isAdmin = String(req.headers[&quot;x-admin&quot;] ?? &quot;false&quot;) === &quot;true&quot;;
    if (!isAdmin) throw new AppError(&quot;FORBIDDEN&quot;, &quot;Admin required&quot;, 403);
    const limit = Number((req.query as any)?.limit ?? 20);
    const result = await runMatchingOnce(app.db as any, Math.min(200, Math.max(1, limit)));
    reply.send({ result });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:mend_line] + &quot;\n&quot; + admin_block + &quot;\n&quot; + market[mend_line:]

# Add job matches listing endpoint after GET /v1/jobs/:job_id
if &#x27;&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/matches&quot;&#x27; not in market:
    gpos = market.find(&#x27;app.get(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id&quot;&#x27;)
    if gpos == -1:
        raise RuntimeError(&quot;jobs/:job_id get not found&quot;)
    gend = market.find(&quot;  });&quot;, gpos)
    gend_line = market.find(&quot;\n&quot;, gend) + 1
    match_list = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
  app.get(&quot;/v1/jobs/:job_id/matches&quot;, async (req, reply) =&gt; {
    tenantIdFrom(req);
    const jobId = (req.params as any).job_id as string;
    const r = await app.db.query(
      `SELECT m.*, a.name AS agent_name
       FROM job_matches m
       LEFT JOIN agents a ON a.id=m.agent_id
       WHERE m.job_id=$1
       ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
       LIMIT 200`,
      [jobId]
    );
    reply.send({ matches: r.rows });
  });
&quot;&quot;&quot;)
    market = market[:gend_line] + &quot;\n&quot; + match_list + &quot;\n&quot; + market[gend_line:]

# Trust/data-class gate in offer creation
if &quot;DATA_CLASS_NOT_ALLOWED&quot; not in market:
    open_check = &#x27;      if (job.rows[0].status !== &quot;open&quot;) throw new AppError(&quot;INVALID_STATE&quot;, &quot;Job not open&quot;, 409, { status: job.rows[0].status });\n&#x27;
    if open_check in market:
        gate = textwrap.dedent(&quot;&quot;&quot;\
      // Trust/data-class gate: provider trust tier must allow job.data_class (privacy/sensitivity)
      const policy = await getGlobalPolicy(app.db as any);
      const trustR = await c.query(`SELECT trust_tier FROM providers WHERE tenant_id=$1`, [providerTenantId]);
      const trustTier = trustR.rowCount ? Number(trustR.rows[0].trust_tier ?? 0) : 0;
      const maxMap = (policy as any).max_data_class_by_trust_tier ?? {};
      const maxAllowed = String(maxMap[String(Math.max(0, Math.min(5, trustTier)))] ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
      const order: any = { D0: 0, D1: 1, D2: 2, D3: 3 };
      const jobDC = String(job.rows[0].data_class ?? &quot;D1&quot;);
      if ((order[jobDC] ?? 99) &gt; (order[maxAllowed] ?? 1)) {
        throw new AppError(&quot;DATA_CLASS_NOT_ALLOWED&quot;, &quot;Provider trust tier not allowed for job data_class&quot;, 403, {
          job_data_class: jobDC,
          max_allowed: maxAllowed,
          trust_tier: trustTier,
        });
      }

&quot;&quot;&quot;)
        market = market.replace(open_check, open_check + &quot;\n&quot; + gate)

# Write back marketplace.ts
market_path.write_text(market, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

# Update README and openapi.yaml if exist
readme_path = proj / &quot;README.md&quot;
if readme_path.exists():
    readme = readme_path.read_text(encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)
else:
    readme = &quot;# Delivery Verification Skeleton\n&quot;
if &quot;v0.7 additions&quot; not in readme:
    readme += &quot;\n\n## v0.7 additions\n- Auto-bid config + match queue + admin-triggered matcher run\n- Trust-tier data_class gates\n- Verified orgs registry (pro bono gate)\n&quot;
readme_path.write_text(readme, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

openapi_path = proj / &quot;openapi.yaml&quot;

else:

openapi_path.write_text(openapi, encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;)

# Sanity: ensure new files exist
assert (proj/&quot;src/services/matcher.ts&quot;).exists()
assert (proj/&quot;migrations/005_marketplace_matching_trust_and_verified_orgs.sql&quot;).exists()

def balance(s):
    stack=0
    for ch in s:
        if ch==&#x27;{&#x27;: stack+=1
        elif ch==&#x27;}&#x27;: stack-=1
    return stack
balance(market)

--- АССИСТЕНТ ---
Готово — продолжение оформил как **v0.7** (auto-bidding + match-queue + trust-tiers/data_class + pro bono только для verified-org).

[Скачать delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.7.zip](sandbox:/mnt/data/delivery-verification-skeleton-v0.7.zip)

## Что добавлено в v0.7

### 1) Очередь матчингa (match-queue)
- При создании job автоматически создаётся запись в `job_match_queue` со статусом `pending`.
- Админ может вручную “прогнать” матчинг (см. endpoint ниже).

### 2) Auto-bidding провайдера (“сдача idle-агентов”)
- У провайдера появились настройки:
  - `auto_bid_enabled`
  - `auto_bid_categories`
  - `auto_bid_min_complexity`
  - `auto_bid_max_daily`
  - `auto_bid_price_floor_cents`
  - `auto_bid_proposal_template`

Матчер берёт **idle** агентов по категории и создаёт **offer автоматически** (auto-bid), плюс пишет запись в `job_matches`.

### 3) Trust tiers + ограничение по `data_class`
- У job появился `data_class: D0|D1|D2|D3` (по умолчанию `D1`).
- В `marketplace_policies` добавлено:
  - `max_data_class_by_trust_tier` (по умолчанию `0→D1, 1→D2, 2+→D3`)
- При создании offer теперь проверяется: **trust tier провайдера должен позволять data_class job**, иначе `403 DATA_CLASS_NOT_ALLOWED`.

### 4) Pro bono только для verified-организаций
- Таблица `verified_orgs`.
- Политика `pro_bono_requires_verified_org` (по умолчанию `true`).
- Если `is_pro_bono=true`, а tenant не в `verified_orgs` → `403 PRO_BONO_VERIFIED_ORG_REQUIRED`.

## Новые/изменённые файлы
- `migrations/005_marketplace_matching_trust_and_verified_orgs.sql`
- `src/services/matcher.ts`
- обновлён `src/routes/marketplace.ts`
- bump версии в `package.json` до `0.7.0`

## Новые API endpoints (MVP)

### Provider auto-bid config
```bash
# посмотреть
GET /v1/providers/me/auto-bid

# настроить
PUT /v1/providers/me/auto-bid
{
  &quot;enabled&quot;: true,
  &quot;categories&quot;: [&quot;code&quot;,&quot;research&quot;],
  &quot;min_complexity&quot;: 40,
  &quot;max_daily&quot;: 15,
  &quot;price_floor_cents&quot;: {&quot;code&quot;: 5000},
  &quot;proposal_template&quot;: &quot;Auto-bid: сделаю быстро и итеративно...&quot;
}
```

### Verified orgs (admin-only)
&gt; Админ-защита в MVP через заголовок `x-admin: true`.
```bash
GET  /v1/marketplace/verified-orgs
POST /v1/marketplace/verified-orgs
{
  &quot;tenant_id&quot;: &quot;UUID&quot;,
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;My Verified NGO&quot;,
  &quot;verified_by&quot;: &quot;admin@local&quot;
}
```

### Ручной запуск матчера (admin-only)
```bash
POST /v1/marketplace/match/run?limit=20
```

### Посмотреть matches по job
```bash
GET /v1/jobs/{job_id}/matches
```

## Важно: что нужно сделать при запуске
1) Применить новую миграцию `005_...sql` (вместе с предыдущими).
2) Для pro bono — добавить нужный tenant в `verified_orgs` (через admin endpoint).
3) Включить авто-ставки у провайдера через `/v1/providers/me/auto-bid`.
4) Создать job → он попадёт в `job_match_queue`.
5) Запустить `/v1/marketplace/match/run` → появится auto-offer и запись в `job_matches`.

Если хочешь, следующий шаг (v0.8) логично сделать так: **expiring/TTL для matches**, “decline/feedback loop” от провайдера, и более умный скоринг (SLA, загрузка, история качества, price bands).
